## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Standard configurator labels apply for size, quantity, material, and design upload options. ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Product Overview

Our A-Frame Signs A-Frame provide professional sidewalk advertising solutions that combine durability with visual impact. Each sign features full-color printing on 4mm corrugated plastic, designed to withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining vibrant graphics. These portable sandwich board signs offer double-sided visibility, maximizing exposure to both pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

Available in multiple configurations including the signicade deluxe a frame white and signicade deluxe a frame black models. The waterproof construction ensures reliable performance in various weather conditions, while the lightweight design allows for easy repositioning throughout the day. Perfect for businesses requiring flexible, maintenance-free outdoor signage that delivers consistent marketing results.

Choose from standard sizes or custom dimensions to match your specific advertising needs. Each unit includes sturdy sign holders engineered for stability and wind resistance, ensuring your message remains visible and professional in all conditions.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Material Options

Our A-Frame Signs A-Frame utilize premium 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast) for optimal durability and print quality. This lightweight yet sturdy material provides excellent resistance to weather, UV rays, and daily handling while maintaining crisp, vibrant graphics throughout extended outdoor use.

The corrugated plastic construction offers superior strength-to-weight ratio compared to traditional materials, ensuring easy transport and setup without sacrificing stability. The smooth surface accepts full-color digital printing beautifully, delivering sharp text and vibrant images that attract customer attention effectively.

Sign holders are constructed from durable materials designed to secure panels firmly while allowing quick sign changes when needed. This material combination provides long-lasting performance for businesses requiring reliable outdoor advertising solutions that maintain professional appearance over time.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Finishing Options

Professional finishing enhances the durability and appearance of your A-Frame Signs A-Frame. Full-color digital printing provides vibrant, fade-resistant graphics that maintain visual impact throughout extended outdoor exposure. The smooth coroplast surface ensures even ink coverage and sharp detail reproduction.

Double-sided printing maximizes visibility from all directions, essential for effective sidewalk advertising. Weather-resistant coating protects against moisture, UV damage, and everyday wear while preserving color integrity. Precision cutting ensures proper fit within sign holders for professional presentation.

Optional lamination provides additional protection for high-traffic locations or harsh weather conditions. All finishing processes are designed to complement the portable nature of A-frame systems while delivering the professional quality businesses need for effective outdoor marketing campaigns.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Production Times

Choose from flexible production schedules ranging from 1 to 5 business days to meet your timeline requirements. Rush production available for urgent projects, while standard timing provides cost-effective solutions for planned campaigns. Production begins immediately upon artwork approval for orders submitted before 5:00 PM CST.

Digital printing technology enables quick turnaround without compromising quality. Proof requests add one business day to production schedules but ensure complete satisfaction before printing begins. Orders requiring custom sizing may require additional production time depending on specifications.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Payment Options

Convenient payment processing accepts major credit cards, PayPal, and business accounts for seamless ordering. Secure checkout protects sensitive information while providing immediate order confirmation and tracking details. Net terms available for qualified business customers with credit approval.

Volume pricing automatically applies to larger quantities, providing cost savings for multiple sign orders or replacement panels. Quote requests available for custom projects or bulk orders requiring special pricing consideration. All transactions processed securely with immediate confirmation and receipt delivery.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Shipping Guidelines

Professional packaging ensures safe delivery of your A-Frame Signs A-Frame. Standard shipping typically delivers within 3-7 business days, with expedited options available for urgent projects. Tracking information provided automatically upon shipment for complete order visibility.

Large or multiple units may require freight delivery depending on size and quantity. Replacement signs ship efficiently in compact packaging, while complete frame units require specialized handling to prevent damage during transit. Free shipping available on qualifying orders over minimum purchase amounts.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Common Uses

Restaurants utilize A-Frame Signs A-Frame for daily specials, menu highlights, and promotional offers that attract sidewalk traffic. Retail stores showcase sales events, new arrivals, and seasonal promotions with easily changeable signage. Professional services advertise hours, services, and special offers to increase foot traffic and customer awareness.

Real estate agents display property information and open house details with portable, professional signage. Event organizers direct attendees and promote activities with weather-resistant outdoor displays. Small businesses benefit from cost-effective advertising that requires no permanent installation or permits.

The versatile design works effectively for temporary promotions, permanent location marketing, and seasonal campaigns. Easy repositioning allows businesses to optimize placement for maximum visibility throughout different times of day or varying traffic patterns.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Artwork Requirements

Upload high-resolution artwork files in standard formats including PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPG/PNG. Minimum 300 DPI resolution ensures crisp printing quality for professional results. Color mode should be CMYK for accurate color reproduction in digital printing processes.

Design templates available for each sign size, providing proper dimensions and bleed areas for optimal results. Online design tool allows custom creation directly on our website with professional templates and graphics library. Include 0.125" bleed on all sides for edge-to-edge printing coverage.

Free proof available upon request to verify design accuracy before production begins. Our design team provides artwork assistance and file optimization services to ensure the best possible printing results.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Maximize your business visibility with professional A-Frame Signs A-Frame that deliver consistent marketing results. These versatile sidewalk signs provide the perfect combination of durability, portability, and visual impact for businesses seeking effective outdoor advertising solutions. The weather-resistant construction ensures reliable performance while the double-sided design maximizes exposure to potential customers.

Consider complementary display options including retractors and other banner stands for comprehensive marketing campaigns. Whether you need single units for specific promotions or multiple signs for ongoing advertising, our A-Frame Signs A-Frame provide the professional quality and reliability your business deserves. Order today to start attracting more customers with effective sidewalk advertising.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions About A-Frame Signs A-Frame

What do people call an A-frame sign?

A-frame signs are commonly called sandwich board signs, sidewalk signs, or pavement signs. These terms all refer to the same portable, double-sided display system that businesses use for outdoor advertising. The "A-frame" name comes from the shape of the supporting structure that resembles the letter "A" when viewed from the side.

What are A-frame signs made of?

Our A-frame signs feature 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast) panels with full-color digital printing, paired with durable sign holders. This lightweight yet sturdy material provides excellent weather resistance and maintains vibrant graphics throughout extended outdoor use. The holders are constructed from materials designed for stability and easy sign changes.

Are A-frame signs waterproof and weather-resistant?

Yes, these signs are completely waterproof and engineered for outdoor use in various weather conditions. The corrugated plastic material resists moisture, UV rays, and temperature fluctuations while maintaining structural integrity. The weather-resistant printing ensures colors remain vibrant even with continuous outdoor exposure and cleaning.

Are A-frame signs double-sided?

Yes, our A-frame signs feature double-sided printing for maximum visibility from all directions. This design ensures your message reaches both foot traffic and vehicle traffic approaching from either direction. Double-sided capability maximizes your advertising investment by providing twice the exposure area on a single sign.

What is the largest A-frame sign size available?

The largest standard A-frame sign size available is 36" × 24" used with our Signicade Deluxe models. This size provides excellent visibility for businesses requiring maximum impact while maintaining portability for daily setup and storage. Custom sizes may be available depending on specific project requirements and frame compatibility.

Can I order replacement signs for my A-frame frame?

Yes, replacement signs are available for all our A-frame systems, allowing you to update promotions, seasonal offers, or menu changes cost-effectively. Simply specify your frame model when ordering to ensure proper fit. This flexibility makes A-frame systems an economical long-term advertising solution for businesses with changing promotional needs.

Styrene Signs Material and Durability Specifications

``` ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ```html

Custom styrene signs are printed on high-quality PVC plastic sheets that combine durability with versatility for professional signage applications. Our styrene signs feature UV-resistant ink technology that maintains vibrant colors and sharp graphics for 3-5 years when properly installed and maintained. The lightweight construction makes these signs easy to handle and install while providing excellent print quality for detailed graphics and text.

Available in two thickness options, our styrene signs accommodate different project requirements and installation methods. The 0.03" thickness offers maximum flexibility and can be rolled for convenient storage and shipping, while the 0.06" option provides added rigidity for permanent installations. Both materials accept high-resolution digital printing with exceptional color accuracy and detail reproduction.

Professional-grade styrene signs are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, making them ideal for retail displays, directional signage, promotional graphics, and temporary event signage. The smooth surface finish ensures optimal ink adhesion and creates sharp, professional-looking results that represent your brand effectively across various commercial and business applications.

``` ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ```html

Custom Sizing Options for Styrene Signs

Our custom styrene signs printing service accommodates projects from small format displays to large-scale signage with maximum dimensions of 4' x 8'. The 0.03" styrene material offers exceptional flexibility, allowing signs to be rolled and shipped in tubes for convenient handling and storage. This thinner option works perfectly for temporary displays, trade show graphics, and applications requiring easy transport.

The 0.06" styrene provides increased structural integrity for permanent installations and applications requiring enhanced durability. Signs exceeding 32" x 48" in either direction require freight shipping to ensure safe delivery. Custom sizing ensures your styrene signs fit perfectly within your designated space while maintaining professional appearance and structural integrity.

Both thickness options support full-color digital printing with precise detail reproduction and consistent color matching across multiple signs. The sizing flexibility allows for creative design implementations while maintaining cost-effective production methods for both single signs and volume orders requiring multiple pieces.

``` ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ```html

Finishing and Customization Options for Styrene Signs

Professional styrene signs printing includes UV-resistant ink application that ensures long-lasting color vibrancy and protection against fading from sun exposure. The smooth PVC surface provides optimal ink adhesion for professional-grade results.

Custom design upload capabilities support various file formats including vector-based files like .eps and .ai with converted fonts, as well as high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files. Our prepress team reviews all artwork to ensure optimal print quality and can provide professional design assistance when needed. ``` ## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ```html

Production Times for Custom Styrene Signs

Flexible production scheduling accommodates urgent deadlines with options ranging from one to five business days. Priority one-day turnaround serves time-sensitive projects, while Express two-day production balances speed with cost-effectiveness. This approval-first process provides additional security and peace of mind for custom orders.

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Styrene Signs

Package protection includes replacement guarantees for items damaged during shipping upon return of damaged goods. Common Applications for Styrene Signs

Professional styrene signs excel in retail environments for product displays, promotional messaging, and directional signage where lightweight construction and professional appearance are essential. Business applications include office signage, lobby displays, trade show graphics, and event signage where portability and professional presentation matter. The flexibility of 0.03" styrene makes it perfect for curved displays and creative installations, while 0.06" thickness provides stability for permanent mounting applications.

``` ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ```html

High quality yard signs offer versatile finishing options to match your specific design and installation needs. Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded to meet shipping guidelines and reduce costs. The scoring process cuts through only the top layer, allowing signs to fold without compromising structural integrity. Signs unfold easily for installation while maintaining professional appearance.

Oversized flat shipping is available for high quality yard signs that cannot be folded. Yard signs requiring flat shipping may have additional shipping costs due to dimensional requirements. ``` ## 11) COMMON USES TAB ```html

High quality yard signs serve diverse commercial and personal applications across multiple industries. ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Your Yard Sign Material Options

Your yard sign is constructed from premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) that delivers exceptional performance for outdoor applications. This material features hollow flutes running horizontally that provide structural strength while keeping the signs lightweight and easy to handle during installation.

The corrugated plastic construction offers waterproof performance and UV resistance, ensuring your custom shaped signage maintains its appearance throughout extended outdoor exposure. This durable material withstands wind, rain, and temperature fluctuations without warping or deteriorating, making it perfect for long-term advertising campaigns.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Your Yard Sign Finishing Options

Your yard sign finishing includes professional options designed to maximize visual impact and installation convenience. Choose between full bleed printing that extends graphics to the edge of your custom shape, or opt for a clean 1/2-inch white margin that frames your design elements.

Single-sided and double-sided printing options accommodate different visibility requirements and budget considerations. ## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Your Yard Sign Production Times

Your yard sign production offers flexible turnaround options ranging from 1 to 5 business days to meet any deadline requirement. Production timing begins once artwork uploads are complete and approved, with same-day emergency rushes available in select cases.

Priority 1-day service accommodates urgent campaigns, while 2-day Express handles time-sensitive projects with an extra day buffer. The popular 3-day Standard option provides the ideal balance of speed and convenience, and 5-day Saver delivers cost savings for non-urgent orders.

Check payments are accepted with orders held for production until payment clears. Credit card charges only process after final order approval, providing complete control over your purchase timing. Corporate accounts and purchase orders may be available for qualifying business customers.

Secure payment processing protects your financial information throughout the ordering process. Payment confirmation triggers immediate production scheduling, with order tracking information provided via email once your custom shaped yard signs enter the manufacturing queue.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Your Yard Sign Shipping Guidelines

Your yard sign shipping includes multiple delivery options designed to meet various timing and budget requirements. Standard shipping provides reliable delivery for most orders, while expedited options accommodate urgent project deadlines.

Signs larger than 32" x 48" automatically receive scoring and folding to meet carrier size restrictions and reduce shipping costs. Flat shipping alternatives are available for orders requiring unfolded delivery, though additional fees may apply based on dimensional requirements.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Your Yard Sign Artwork Requirements

Your yard sign artwork performs best when submitted as .eps files converted to outlines, ensuring precise reproduction of fonts and graphics. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files also produce excellent results, with our prepress team available to evaluate file quality before production begins.

Professional graphic design services are available if you need assistance creating or optimizing artwork for your custom shaped signage. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, which provides accurate color representation before final production.

Order proofs allow you to review artwork, pricing, and order details before production begins, ensuring complete accuracy for your project. The proof process includes low-resolution artwork preview, order summary, and billing confirmation. Production holds until you provide final approval, giving you complete control over the process.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Custom shaped yard signs from Banners.com deliver professional results for any outdoor advertising campaign. Our streamlined ordering process, flexible production times, and comprehensive finishing options ensure your project meets exact specifications while staying within budget constraints.

The combination of durable 4mm corrugated plastic construction and vibrant digital printing creates signage that maintains its appearance throughout extended outdoor exposure. Whether you need a single custom design or multiple signs with different shapes, our production capabilities accommodate projects of any scale.

Professional installation accessories including various stake options and mounting hardware ensure secure placement in any ground condition. With custom sizes available and expert customer service support, creating effective custom shaped yard signs has never been more convenient or affordable for your specific application needs.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are custom shaped yard signs made from?

Custom shaped yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) with hollow flutes for lightweight durability. This waterproof material withstands outdoor weather conditions while maintaining vibrant full-color digital printing quality. The construction provides excellent value for both short-term and extended advertising campaigns with professional appearance retention.

Yes, our professional graphic design team assists with custom shaped yard sign creation and artwork optimization. We provide free online templates, intuitive design tools, and expert consultation for complex projects. Design services ensure your artwork meets production requirements while maximizing visual impact for your specific application and budget.

Priority 1-day service handles urgent orders, while 5-day Saver options provide cost savings. Production begins after artwork approval, with same-day emergency rushes available in select cases through customer service.

Do custom shaped yard signs include installation hardware?

Installation accessories are available including H-stakes in multiple sizes, heavy-duty Beefy Stakes, and professional zip ties for secure mounting. Stakes accommodate different ground conditions and sign dimensions. All hardware options can be added during the ordering process to ensure complete installation readiness upon delivery.

Are there size limitations for custom shaped yard signs?

Custom shaped yard signs accommodate virtually any size requirement, with signs exceeding 32" x 48" receiving automatic scoring and folding for shipping efficiency. Flat shipping options are available for larger signs requiring unfolded delivery. Can I request a proof before my custom shaped yard signs are printed?

Emergency same-day rushes may be available for critical situations - contact customer service for availability confirmation. Production time represents manufacturing duration only; total delivery time includes both production and shipping periods based on your selected shipping method.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

All magnetic signs require payment before production begins, ensuring efficient order processing and immediate manufacturing start. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for convenient online transactions. Your card won't be charged until you've approved your final order details and artwork.

Check payments are also accepted for customers preferring traditional payment methods. Checks must be received and cleared before production begins, so factor additional processing time into your project timeline. This option works well for larger orders and customers with established accounts.

Our secure payment processing protects your financial information while streamlining the ordering experience. Payment confirmation triggers immediate artwork review and production scheduling, minimizing delays in your magnetic signs manufacturing process.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Standard UPS Ground shipping reaches 90% of the United States within 1-3 business days, providing reliable delivery for most magnetic signs orders. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination, with tracking numbers provided once your order ships. Expedited options include overnight, 2-day, and 3-day services for time-sensitive deliveries.

Large orders may incur additional shipping charges due to size and weight considerations. Economy shipping adds 5-10 business days but reduces shipping costs for budget-conscious orders. International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation, with USPS and UPS accepted for international deliveries.

All shipping company terms apply once packages leave our facility. Damaged goods require return before replacement shipment, while lost packages are replaced after carrier confirmation of loss, typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery date.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Magnetic signs excel in vehicle advertising applications, transforming cars, trucks, and vans into mobile billboards that promote your business wherever you drive. These removable signs protect your vehicle's paint while delivering professional advertising impact. Service professionals, delivery companies, and sales teams rely on magnetic vehicle signage for cost-effective brand visibility.

Business environments benefit from magnetic signs on filing cabinets, whiteboards, and metal fixtures for wayfinding, departmental identification, and promotional messaging. Retail stores use magnetic signage for pricing displays, product information, and seasonal promotions that update easily without permanent installation. Trade shows and events utilize magnetic signs for booth identification and sponsor recognition.

Real estate professionals choose magnetic signs for property advertising and agent identification that transfers between vehicles and properties. Construction companies use magnetic signage for project identification and safety messaging. The versatility of custom dry erase magnets extends into interactive applications where information changes regularly while maintaining professional presentation standards.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Vector-based files like .eps with outlined fonts provide optimal print quality for crisp text and sharp graphics. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files also produce excellent results when properly prepared. Our prepress team reviews all artwork to ensure compatibility with our printing processes and magnetic material specifications.

Order proofs allow you to verify artwork placement, text accuracy, and color representation before production begins. Proof requests pause production until you provide approval, so factor review time into your project schedule. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System for precise color matching.

Professional graphic design services are available if you need artwork creation or modification assistance. Our designers understand magnetic signage requirements and can optimize your graphics for maximum impact and readability on magnetic materials.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional magnetic signs represent a smart investment in flexible, reusable advertising that adapts to your changing marketing needs. Unlike permanent signage solutions, magnetic signs move with your business, providing consistent brand visibility across multiple locations and applications. The combination of professional printing quality and convenient magnetic installation creates advertising opportunities that traditional signs cannot match.

Our manufacturing expertise ensures each magnetic sign meets rigorous quality standards for adhesion strength, print durability, and weather resistance. From initial design consultation through final delivery, we support your project with responsive customer service and technical expertise. Whether you're launching a new business, expanding your marketing reach, or updating existing signage, magnetic signs deliver the flexibility and professional appearance your brand deserves.

Ready to create magnetic signs that work as hard as your business? Our streamlined ordering process, competitive pricing, and reliable production schedules make professional magnetic signage accessible for businesses of all sizes.

## 14) FAQ
**What surfaces do magnetic signs work best on?**

Magnetic signs adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including steel vehicle panels, appliances, filing cabinets, and magnetic whiteboards. They won't stick to aluminum, plastic, or fiberglass surfaces. Before ordering, test your intended surface with a small magnet to verify compatibility. Steel vehicle doors and hoods provide excellent adhesion for mobile advertising applications.

**How long do magnetic signs typically last?**

With proper care and storage, our laminated magnetic signs maintain their appearance and adhesion for 3-5 years of regular use. Lifespan depends on exposure conditions, with indoor applications lasting longer than outdoor use. Regular cleaning and flat storage when not in use extend operational life. UV-resistant inks and protective lamination prevent fading and cracking.

**Are magnetic signs safe for vehicle paint?**

Quality magnetic signs won't damage vehicle paint when properly applied and maintained. Clean both the sign and vehicle surface before application, and remove signs regularly for cleaning underneath. Avoid dragging signs across painted surfaces, and store them flat when not in use. Rounded corners reduce wind lift and paint contact pressure.

**What's the maximum size available for magnetic signs?**

Our magnetic signs are available up to 24" x 24" maximum dimensions. This size limitation ensures proper magnetic adhesion and material stability. Larger advertising needs can be met with multiple coordinated signs or alternative signage solutions. Custom shapes within these dimensions are available through contour cutting options for unique design requirements.

**Can magnetic signs withstand weather exposure?**

Our laminated magnetic signs resist rain, snow, and UV exposure for reliable outdoor performance. The protective lamination shields graphics from moisture and prevents color fading. However, extreme weather conditions like hail or ice storms may damage any exterior signage. Remove signs during severe weather when possible to extend their lifespan.

**Do you offer rush production for urgent orders?**

Yes, we provide 1-day priority production for urgent magnetic sign needs, with same-day rush service potentially available in special circumstances. Contact customer service immediately for same-day requests to verify availability. All rush orders require payment and artwork approval by 5:00 PM CST for next-day completion. Expedited shipping options ensure fast delivery.

Sintra Signs Plastic Material Options and Specifications

Our custom Sintra signs plastic are manufactured using premium rigid PVC material in 3mm and 6mm thicknesses. This durable plastic substrate provides exceptional dimensional stability and weather resistance, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor signage applications. The material accepts vibrant full-color digital printing with excellent ink adhesion and color saturation.

``` ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ```html

Premium Plastic Material Construction

Our Sintra signs plastic utilize high-grade rigid PVC foam board construction available in two thickness options. The 3mm thickness provides lightweight portability while maintaining structural integrity for temporary displays and indoor applications. The 6mm option offers enhanced rigidity and impact resistance for permanent installations and outdoor environments.

Both material options feature closed-cell foam construction that resists moisture absorption and temperature fluctuations. The smooth, non-porous surface accepts digital inks beautifully, producing vibrant colors and sharp detail reproduction. This substrate maintains dimensional stability without warping or bowing over time.

The material's router-friendly composition allows for precise custom shape cutting, creating unique die-cut designs that enhance your brand presentation. Whether you need standard rectangular signs or complex custom shapes, our plastic material delivers consistent results with clean, professional edges that require no additional finishing.

``` ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ```html

Standard finishing includes precision square cutting with smooth, clean edges that provide a professional appearance straight from production. Our advanced cutting equipment ensures accurate dimensions and perpendicular corners for perfect mounting and display alignment.

``` ## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ```html

Shipping Guidelines for Sintra Signs Plastic

Standard shipping utilizes UPS Ground service with 1-3 day delivery to 90% of United States locations. Tracking information is provided automatically once your order ships, allowing real-time delivery monitoring throughout the shipping process.

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or where height plus width totals 81 inches require freight shipping due to size restrictions. Maximum production size is 4' x 8' with freight shipping accommodating these larger dimensions. Additional shipping charges apply based on weight, dimensions, and destination.

Multiple shipping speed options include economy, standard, three-day, two-day, and overnight delivery. Similar to truck magnetic signs shipping protocols, careful packaging protects your investment during transit while maintaining cost-effectiveness across all delivery timeframes.

``` ## 11) COMMON USES TAB ```html

Common Applications for Sintra Signs Plastic

Business advertising applications include storefront displays, promotional signage, and trade show graphics where durability and professional appearance are essential. The rigid construction supports mounting systems and display hardware while maintaining visual impact over extended use periods.

Indoor applications encompass office signage, directional displays, menu boards, and presentation graphics. Why Choose Professional Sintra Signs Plastic from Banners.com

Since 2001, we've specialized in producing high-quality custom signage solutions that deliver exceptional value and professional results. Choose 3mm thickness for lightweight indoor displays, temporary signage, and applications where portability is important. ``` ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ```html

Our yard signs are manufactured using premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material, specifically engineered for outdoor advertising applications. This lightweight yet durable substrate features hollow flutes running horizontally, providing exceptional strength-to-weight ratio and superior weather resistance for extended outdoor exposure.

``` ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ```html

Large format yard signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81 inches receive automatic scoring and folding to meet shipping requirements. This process involves cutting through the top layer without penetrating the entire thickness, allowing controlled folding while maintaining structural integrity.

Optional installation accessories include H-stakes in various sizes (10x15, 10x24, 10x30), heavy-duty beefy stakes for challenging ground conditions, and professional zip ties for alternative mounting applications. These accessories ensure secure installation and optimal display positioning.

``` ## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ```html

``` ## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ```html

Efficient shipping processes ensure timely delivery of your custom yard signs nationwide. Standard shipping methods include UPS Ground, UPS 2nd Day Air, and UPS Next Day Air, with carrier selection based on production timeline and delivery requirements.

Real-time order tracking provides complete visibility into production status and shipping progress. Tracking information is automatically provided upon order completion, enabling precise delivery coordination for your campaign timeline requirements.

``` ## 11) COMMON USES TAB ```html

Custom yard signs serve diverse promotional and advertising applications across residential, commercial, and institutional sectors. Business advertising utilizes yard signs for grand openings, sales events, service promotions, and brand awareness campaigns that capture attention from passing pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

Political campaigns rely on yard signs for candidate promotion, ballot measure advocacy, and voter engagement throughout election cycles. The weather-resistant construction ensures reliable performance throughout extended campaign periods regardless of seasonal weather conditions.

Real estate professionals use yard signs for property listings, open house announcements, agent branding, and development marketing. The professional appearance and customizable sizing accommodate various property types and marketing strategies.

Special events including graduations, fundraisers, community festivals, and construction notifications benefit from temporary yard signage that communicates specific information to target audiences. Our yard letter and number signs complement traditional yard signs for address displays and directional guidance applications.

``` ## 12) ARTWORK TAB ```html

Professional artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and accurate reproduction of your yard signs design. Vector-based EPS files converted to outlines provide the highest quality results, while high-resolution PDF and JPG formats offer convenient alternatives for most design applications.

Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, providing accurate color representation before final production. This service ensures precise color matching for brand-specific requirements and consistent campaign materials.

Our professional graphic design team provides comprehensive design assistance for customers requiring artwork creation or modification services. Design consultation includes layout optimization, color selection, and messaging refinement to maximize visual impact and readability.

The frame can be weighted with sand or water for enhanced stability in windy conditions. Order replacement signs to update messaging seasonally or for special promotions without purchasing new hardware.

``` ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ```html

Simpo Sign A-frames feature premium 4mm corrugated plastic construction that combines lightweight portability with exceptional durability. The hollow-fluted design mimics cardboard structure while providing complete waterproof protection against rain, snow, and moisture. This advanced plastic material resists cracking, warping, and UV degradation even with continuous outdoor exposure.

The frame hardware utilizes high-grade plastic components engineered for repeated folding and unfolding without stress fractures. Unlike metal alternatives, this material won't rust, corrode, or require ongoing maintenance. Every Simpo Sign A-frame receives premium full-bleed printing that extends graphics completely to the edges without white borders. The lightweight construction requires no additional lamination or protective coatings, keeping costs low while delivering weather-resistant performance. Standard ground shipping delivers most Simpo Sign A-frame orders within 3-7 business days via UPS or FedEx. Expedited options include 2-day and overnight delivery for time-sensitive projects. Alaska, Hawaii, and international destinations incur additional shipping charges calculated by weight and distance. Large quantity orders may qualify for freight shipping options that reduce per-unit delivery costs. Contact customer service for shipping estimates to specific locations or special delivery requirements.

``` ## 11) COMMON USES TAB ```html

Restaurants utilize Simpo Sign A-frames for displaying outdoor menus, daily specials, happy hour promotions, and seasonal offerings. The dual-sided design allows menu display on one side and promotional messages on the other, maximizing customer engagement and driving sales.

Retail businesses showcase grand opening announcements, sale promotions, store hours, and special events. Professional services including salons, auto repair shops, and medical offices advertise services, business hours, and special promotions. Real estate agents highlight open houses and property features. Event planners use multiple units for wayfinding, vendor identification, and program information at outdoor festivals and markets.

Educational institutions promote enrollment periods, campus events, and important announcements. The weather-resistant construction performs reliably in parking lots, sidewalks, strip malls, and other high-traffic outdoor locations where traditional signage might fail.

``` ## 12) ARTWORK TAB ```html

Upload custom artwork files in PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution PNG/JPEG formats optimized for 22" x 27" dimensions. Our design team reviews all uploaded files for print readiness and contacts you regarding any necessary adjustments.

Choose from our extensive template library featuring professionally designed layouts for restaurants, retail, churches, and general business applications. Design assistance from our in-house graphics team helps optimize artwork for maximum impact and readability. Consider pairing your Simpo Sign A-frame with our other a frames for comprehensive outdoor advertising coverage. What is a Simpo Sign A-frame sidewalk sign?

A Simpo Sign A-frame is a portable, foldable advertising display that holds two 22" x 27" printed signs in a sturdy plastic frame. ## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Size: Custom Sizes Available Material: 30 Mil Magnetic Material Finish: Laminated Surface Protection Printing: Full Color CMYK Quantity: No Minimum Order ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Magnets for Home Material Options

Our magnets for home are manufactured using premium 30 mil magnetic material that provides strong holding power while remaining flexible and easy to reposition. The base magnetic layer features consistent magnetic strength across the entire surface, ensuring reliable adhesion to steel, iron, and other ferromagnetic surfaces throughout your home or business.

Each custom magnet includes a protective laminated surface finish that resists water, scratches, and everyday wear. This professional coating extends the lifespan of your magnets while maintaining vibrant color reproduction and sharp text clarity. Our magnetic material maintains its holding strength in temperatures ranging from -40°F to 160°F, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor home applications.

We offer standard and reflective magnetic material options to suit different visibility requirements. The reflective option enhances safety for vehicle applications, while standard material works perfectly for custom fridge magnets and indoor organizational uses. All materials accept full-color digital printing with fade-resistant inks.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Custom Magnets for Home Finishing Options

Our finishing options for magnets for home ensure optimal durability and professional appearance. The standard laminated finish provides a smooth, semi-gloss surface that resists moisture, fingerprints, and daily handling while maintaining excellent print quality and color vibrancy.

For specialized applications, we offer write-on surfaces compatible with both permanent markers and dry-erase materials. This finish allows you to create interactive magnets for planning, notes, and temporary messaging while preserving the underlying printed design. The surface cleans easily with mild soap and water.

All finishing options include rounded corner cutting as standard, which prevents edges from lifting and extends product life. Custom dry erase magnets feature an enhanced coating specifically designed for repeated writing and erasing. UV-resistant properties in our finishing protect against sun exposure for outdoor applications.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Production Times for Custom Home Magnets

We offer flexible production schedules for magnets for home to accommodate your timeline requirements. Standard production takes 3-5 business days and includes design review, printing, finishing, and quality control inspection. This timeframe ensures careful attention to detail and optimal print quality.

Rush production options are available for urgent projects, with 1-2 day turnaround available for most standard sizes and quantities. Express production maintains our quality standards while prioritizing your order through our production workflow. Large quantity orders may require additional production time depending on specifications.

Production begins after artwork approval and payment processing. We provide digital proofs within 24 hours of order placement, allowing you to review and approve your magnets for home design before printing begins. Changes can be made during the proof stage without affecting production schedules.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Payment Options for Magnets for Home Orders

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and business checks for magnets for home orders. Credit card payments process immediately, allowing for the fastest order fulfillment. PayPal provides secure payment processing with buyer protection for both personal and business accounts.

Business customers can establish net payment terms with approved credit applications. We offer purchase order processing for established commercial accounts, schools, and government organizations. All payment methods include order confirmation and detailed invoicing for your records.

Secure payment processing protects your financial information throughout the transaction. Orders are processed immediately upon payment confirmation, and you'll receive order tracking information via email.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Home Magnets

Magnets for home ship via UPS and FedEx with tracking provided for all orders. Standard shipping typically delivers within 3-7 business days depending on destination. Expedited shipping options include overnight and 2-day delivery for time-sensitive projects.

Orders are carefully packaged in protective materials to prevent damage during transit. Large magnets ship flat in rigid mailers, while smaller quantities use padded envelopes with cardboard backing. Fragile items receive additional bubble wrap protection and "Handle with Care" labeling.

Shipping costs are calculated based on size, weight, and destination. Free shipping is available on qualifying orders over specified amounts. Truck magnetic signs and oversized orders may require freight shipping for optimal protection and delivery.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Common Uses for Magnets for Home Applications

Magnets for home serve diverse organizational and decorative purposes throughout residential and business environments. Popular applications include refrigerator calendars, meal planning guides, and family photo displays that transform kitchen spaces into functional command centers.

Business applications include promotional magnets for customer retention, vehicle advertising for mobile marketing, and trade show giveaways that keep your brand visible long after events end. Educational uses encompass classroom organization, student rewards, and interactive learning tools that engage and inform.

Creative applications include custom artwork displays, seasonal decorations, and personalized gifts that showcase memories and achievements. Organizational uses span office whiteboards, workshop tool identification, and inventory management systems. Custom car magnets provide removable advertising solutions for temporary campaigns and rental vehicles.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Artwork Requirements for Custom Home Magnets

Submit artwork for magnets for home in high-resolution formats including PDF, AI, EPS, or PNG files at 300 DPI minimum. Vector files provide the best quality for text and logos, while high-resolution raster images work well for photographs and complex graphics.

Design files should include 1/8" bleed on all edges for precise cutting and finishing. Text should be at least 8-point size for optimal readability, with sans-serif fonts recommended for small text elements. Color files should use CMYK color mode for accurate print reproduction.

Our design team provides free artwork assistance and can create custom designs from your concepts, logos, and specifications. Digital proofs are provided for all orders, allowing you to review colors, layout, and text before production begins. Revisions are included during the proof stage to ensure complete satisfaction.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Types of Magnets for Home and Business

Our comprehensive selection of magnets for home includes specialized options for every application and environment. Each type features unique characteristics designed to optimize performance for specific uses, from heavy-duty vehicle magnets to delicate photo displays.

Professional-grade construction ensures consistent magnetic strength and durability across all product types. Whether you need weatherproof outdoor advertising or decorative indoor accents, our magnetic products deliver reliable performance with easy customization options. All types accept full-color printing and custom sizing to match your exact requirements.

From promotional business cards that stick to filing cabinets to family calendars that organize busy schedules, our magnets for home provide practical solutions that combine functionality with visual appeal. Each product type undergoes quality testing to ensure optimal adhesion and longevity in its intended environment.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional Magnets for Home Design and Installation

Creating effective magnets for home requires careful consideration of size, placement, and design elements that maximize both functionality and visual impact. Our experienced design team helps optimize layouts for readability while ensuring magnetic strength meets your specific application requirements.

Installation is straightforward for most magnetic surfaces, but proper preparation ensures optimal adhesion and longevity. Clean target surfaces remove dirt, wax, and debris that can reduce holding power. For vehicle applications, test magnetic attraction before applying large magnets to verify compatibility with your car's metal composition.

Maintenance involves periodic cleaning and inspection to preserve appearance and performance. Store unused magnets flat and separated to prevent magnetic field degradation. With proper care, your custom magnets provide years of reliable service for home organization, business promotion, and creative applications throughout your space.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions About Magnets for Home

Will a magnet stick to my car?

Magnets adhere to ferromagnetic metals like steel and iron, but won't stick to aluminum, fiberglass, or carbon fiber panels. Most car doors and hoods contain sufficient steel for magnetic attachment, but test a small area first. Newer vehicles may have aluminum panels that aren't magnetic. Our magnets work best on flat, smooth metal surfaces without excessive curves or body lines.

What materials are custom home magnets made from?

Our magnets for home use 30 mil flexible magnetic material with a protective laminated surface coating. The magnetic base provides strong holding power while remaining flexible for easy application and removal. The laminated finish resists water, scratches, and UV fading while maintaining vibrant colors and sharp text reproduction for years of reliable use.

Are magnets for home weatherproof?

Our magnets feature water-resistant construction suitable for normal outdoor exposure including light rain and humidity. While not completely waterproof, they withstand typical weather conditions when properly applied to clean, dry surfaces. For extended outdoor use, remove magnets during severe weather and car washes to prevent water infiltration underneath the magnetic surface.

How long do custom home magnets last?

With proper care and use, our magnets for home typically last 3-5 years while maintaining strong magnetic attraction and print quality. Lifespan depends on environmental conditions, handling frequency, and surface preparation. Indoor applications generally last longer than outdoor uses. Regular cleaning and proper storage when not in use help maximize durability and appearance retention.

What's the minimum order for magnets for home?

No minimum order quantity is required - order as few as one magnet or purchase in bulk quantities. Our flexible ordering system accommodates both personal and business needs without forcing unnecessary inventory. Quantity-based pricing provides automatic discounts for larger orders, with per-unit costs decreasing as quantities increase through our online configurator system.

Do you offer bulk pricing on home magnets?

Yes, our quantity-based pricing structure automatically applies bulk discounts as you increase order quantities. Higher volumes receive progressively lower per-unit pricing, making large orders more economical. Volume discounts appear in real-time through our online configurator, allowing you to see cost savings immediately. Business customers can establish accounts for additional pricing benefits on recurring orders.

H4: Search ``` ## 2) AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ``` H1: Custom Photo Magnets H2: Photo Magnets Photo Material Options H2: Photo Magnets Photo Finishing Options H2: Photo Magnets Photo Production Times H2: Photo Magnets Photo Payment Options H2: Photo Magnets Photo Shipping Guidelines H2: Photo Magnets Photo Common Uses H2: Photo Magnets Photo Artwork Requirements H2: More About Photo Magnets Photo H2: Photo Magnets Photo FAQ ``` ## 3) PRODUCT HEADER
Transform your favorite memories into custom photo magnets that showcase your personal moments or business branding. Our high-quality photo magnets photo printing service delivers vibrant, durable results using professional-grade magnetic material and full-color digital printing. Perfect for refrigerators, vehicles, or any magnetic surface, these personalized magnets preserve your images with lasting clarity and strong adhesion.
## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS - Size Options - Upload Photo - Cut Style - Production Time - Quantity ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Material Options

Our custom photo magnets combine premium 30-mil magnetic material with professional photo printing to create stunning keepsakes and promotional items. Each photo magnet features your uploaded image printed in full-color digital quality with protective lamination included for enhanced durability. These versatile magnets work perfectly for personal memories, business promotions, or custom gifts that recipients will treasure. The magnetic base provides strong adhesion to refrigerators, filing cabinets, vehicles, and other metal surfaces while maintaining easy repositioning capability. Our photo magnets photo printing process ensures accurate color reproduction and sharp image detail, making your favorite pictures come alive as functional magnetic displays. Whether you're creating family photo displays, promotional giveaways, or personalized gifts, these magnets offer the perfect combination of visual appeal and practical functionality for any application. Maximum print size accommodates designs up to 24" x 24", providing flexibility for everything from wallet-sized keepsakes to larger display pieces. The laminated surface protects against moisture, fading, and everyday wear while maintaining the magnetic strength needed for reliable performance across various indoor and outdoor applications.
## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Material Options

Our photo magnets utilize premium 30-mil magnetic material specifically designed for photographic applications and long-term durability. This professional-grade magnetic base provides superior holding strength while remaining flexible enough for easy application and removal without surface damage. The magnetic material works effectively on all ferrous metal surfaces including refrigerators, vehicles, filing cabinets, and magnetic whiteboards. Each photo magnet includes protective lamination applied over your printed image, creating a moisture-resistant barrier that prevents fading, scratching, and everyday wear. This lamination process ensures your photo magnets photo maintain their vibrant colors and sharp image quality even with frequent handling or outdoor exposure. Before ordering, please verify that your intended surface is magnetic-receptive, as these magnets will not adhere to aluminum panels, plastic surfaces, or non-ferrous materials. Our truck magnetic signs use similar high-quality materials for customers requiring larger vehicle applications. The combination of premium magnetic material and protective lamination delivers professional results that preserve your images while providing reliable magnetic performance across diverse applications and environments.
## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Finishing Options

Choose from three professional cut options to achieve the perfect finishing style for your custom photo magnets. Our standard rounded corner finish provides optimal airflow characteristics around the edges, reducing wind resistance and improving adhesion durability, especially for vehicle applications or outdoor use. Square cut finishing delivers crisp, clean edges ideal for professional presentations, business promotions, or precise geometric designs. This option works exceptionally well for corporate branding applications where sharp, defined edges complement your visual identity and create a polished appearance. Contour cutting follows the exact outline of your design elements, creating unique shaped magnets that highlight specific subjects or logos within your photo. This premium finishing option transforms standard rectangular magnets into custom die-cut pieces that stand out from traditional formats. All finishing options include the same protective lamination and high-quality magnetic material, ensuring consistent performance regardless of your chosen edge treatment. Our custom fridge magnets utilize these same finishing techniques for customers seeking different magnetic applications. The finishing choice depends on your specific aesthetic preferences, intended use environment, and design requirements for optimal visual impact and functional performance.
## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Production Times

Select from flexible production timeframes ranging from one to five business days to match your project deadline and budget requirements. Our 1 Business Day Priority service delivers the fastest turnaround for urgent photo magnet orders, while 5 Business Days Saver option provides cost savings for less time-sensitive projects. Production timing begins once your artwork upload is complete and approved. Orders requiring proof approval or prepress adjustments start their production countdown after final approval is received. All orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day. The 3 Business Days Standard option represents our most popular choice, offering an ideal balance of speed and value for most custom photo magnet projects. This timeframe accommodates thorough quality control while maintaining competitive delivery schedules. Production times reflect manufacturing only and do not include shipping duration, so factor in your selected shipping method when calculating total delivery time for your photo magnets photo order.
## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Payment Options

All custom photo magnets require full payment before production begins to ensure efficient order processing and timely delivery. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing and quick production starts. Check payments are also accepted for customers preferring traditional payment methods, though orders cannot enter production until check funds are received and cleared. This payment option works well for larger quantity orders or corporate accounts with established payment procedures. Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your final order details, artwork, and specifications. This approval process ensures complete accuracy before any payment processing occurs. For questions about payment processing, corporate accounts, or alternative payment arrangements, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss options that meet your specific business requirements and ordering preferences.
## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Shipping Guidelines

Standard UPS Ground shipping provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States, with tracking numbers provided once your photo magnets ship from our Minnesota production facility. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination, with additional charges applying to oversized orders exceeding standard dimensional limits. Expedited shipping options include Overnight, Two Day, and Three Day services for time-sensitive photo magnet deliveries. Economy shipping adds 5-10 additional days but provides cost savings for less urgent orders. When selecting economy shipping, include complete address details including P.O. Box information in the Address Two field during checkout. International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation, with USPS and UPS being our only accepted international carriers. Our custom car magnets ship using identical methods and timeframes. After shipment, all carrier terms apply for lost or delayed packages, with replacement products sent only after carrier confirmation of loss, typically requiring 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery.
## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Common Uses

Custom photo magnets serve diverse personal and business applications, from preserving family memories on refrigerators to creating promotional giveaways that customers keep and use regularly. These versatile magnets work perfectly for real estate agents, restaurants, service businesses, and retail stores seeking memorable marketing pieces that provide ongoing brand visibility. Personal applications include wedding favors, graduation announcements, baby photos, pet pictures, vacation memories, and holiday gifts that recipients treasure long after special occasions pass. The magnetic functionality ensures photos remain visible and accessible while protecting precious memories from damage or loss. Business uses encompass promotional calendars, contact information displays, menu magnets, appointment reminders, and branded photo contests that engage customers while promoting services. Many businesses use photo magnets as customer appreciation gifts, combining personal touches with marketing effectiveness. Educational institutions, sports teams, and community organizations utilize photo magnets for fundraising, team photos, school pictures, and event commemorations. The durability and visual appeal of these magnets make them ideal for applications requiring both aesthetic quality and practical functionality across residential, commercial, and institutional environments.
## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Photo Magnets Photo Artwork Requirements

Vector-based files such as .eps with outlined fonts deliver the highest print quality for your photo magnets, though high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files also produce excellent results. Our professional graphic design team can evaluate your artwork quality and provide recommendations or assistance to ensure optimal printing outcomes. Order proofs are available for customers wanting to verify artwork, pricing, and order details before production begins. The proof includes a low-resolution preview image, complete order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping information for your review and approval before manufacturing starts. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, which provides the most accurate color verification available for your specific photo magnet requirements. Upload print-ready files directly through our online system, or work with our design team who can help optimize your images for the best possible magnetic printing results. Contact customer service for assistance with artwork preparation, file optimization, or design services.
## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

More About Photo Magnets Photo

Professional photo magnets photo printing combines advanced digital technology with premium magnetic materials to create lasting keepsakes and effective promotional tools. Our Minnesota production facility utilizes state-of-the-art printing equipment and quality control processes to ensure every magnet meets our high standards for color accuracy, image sharpness, and magnetic performance. The versatility of custom photo magnets makes them valuable for countless applications across personal, business, and organizational needs. From preserving cherished family moments to promoting business services, these durable magnets provide functionality that traditional prints cannot match. The magnetic backing transforms any compatible metal surface into a display area while protecting your images with professional lamination. Our comprehensive customization options, flexible production timeframes, and reliable shipping services make ordering photo magnets convenient and efficient. Whether you need a single commemorative piece or bulk quantities for marketing campaigns, our streamlined ordering process accommodates projects of any size. The combination of premium materials, professional printing, and competitive pricing delivers exceptional value for customers seeking high-quality magnetic photo products that exceed expectations.
## 14) FAQ

Photo Magnets Photo FAQ

**Can I use my own photos and artwork for custom photo magnets?** Yes, you can upload your own photos, artwork, or designs directly through our online ordering system. We accept various file formats including high-resolution JPG, PDF, and vector-based EPS files. Our graphic design team can also help optimize your images for the best printing results or assist with design modifications if needed. **What material are photo magnets made from and how strong is the magnetic hold?** Our photo magnets use premium 30-mil magnetic material that provides strong, reliable adhesion to any ferrous metal surface. The magnetic base is flexible yet durable, allowing easy repositioning without losing holding strength. Each magnet includes protective lamination over your printed image for enhanced durability and moisture resistance. **What surfaces work best with photo magnets and what should I avoid?** Photo magnets adhere perfectly to refrigerators, filing cabinets, magnetic whiteboards, steel doors, and vehicle panels made of steel. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, wood, glass, or non-ferrous metal surfaces. Before ordering, test a small magnet on your intended surface to confirm magnetic compatibility. **How long do custom photo magnets last and can they be used outdoors?** With proper care, photo magnets maintain their image quality and magnetic strength for years. The protective lamination resists fading, moisture, and everyday wear. While suitable for outdoor use, prolonged exposure to extreme weather conditions may affect longevity. Indoor applications typically provide the longest lifespan and best appearance retention. **What production and shipping timeframes are available for photo magnet orders?** Production times range from 1 to 5 business days depending on your selected option and urgency requirements. Standard UPS Ground shipping provides 1-3 day delivery to most US locations. Expedited shipping options include overnight, two-day, and three-day services for faster delivery when needed for special events or urgent projects.

Transform your event presentation with premium custom fabric table covers featuring vibrant dye sublimation printing. Our professional-grade table throws, fitted covers, and runners deliver exceptional color reproduction and durability for trade shows, corporate events, and special occasions. Available in multiple sizes with full customization options, these washable fabric table covers provide the perfect branded solution for any professional display requirement. See also [yard letter and number signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-letter-and-number-signs).

## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS **Size Selection:** Choose Your Table Dimensions **Style Options:** Table Throw, Fitted Cover, or Runner **Material Type:** Premium Fabric Selection **Printing Method:** Full-Color Dye Sublimation **Quantity:** Enter Desired Amount ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Fabric Table Cover Product Selection

Our custom fabric table covers utilize advanced dye sublimation printing technology that infuses ink directly into the fabric fibers, creating vibrant, long-lasting colors that won't crack, peel, or fade. Unlike traditional screen printing methods, this process ensures your designs maintain their professional appearance through countless events and washing cycles.

Available in three distinct styles to meet your specific needs: fitted table covers for a tailored, professional look; table throws for complete coverage and elegance; and table runners for accent branding. Each fabric table cover option accommodates standard rectangular table sizes while offering custom sizing capabilities for unique requirements.

The premium fabric construction provides excellent drape characteristics and wrinkle resistance, making setup effortless at any venue. Whether you're showcasing products at trade shows, hosting corporate events, or creating memorable wedding displays, these fabric table covers deliver the professional presentation your brand deserves while maintaining easy care and storage convenience.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Custom Fabric Table Cover Materials & Construction

Our fabric table covers are crafted from premium banner soft fabric, specifically engineered for durability and professional presentation. This lightweight yet resilient material provides excellent color saturation while maintaining a sophisticated drape that enhances any event setup.

The specialized fabric construction resists wrinkling during transport and storage, ensuring your fabric table covers arrive ready for immediate use. The material's unique weave structure allows for optimal ink penetration during the dye sublimation process, resulting in sharp graphics and vibrant colors that remain consistent across the entire surface.

Machine washable in cold water on gentle cycles, these fabric table covers maintain their appearance and color integrity through repeated cleaning. The fabric's quick-drying properties and low-maintenance requirements make them ideal for frequent use in demanding commercial environments. Air drying is recommended, with low-heat tumble drying available for wrinkle removal when needed.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Fabric Table Cover Finishing Options

Each fabric table cover features professionally finished edges with reinforced stitching to ensure long-lasting durability. Our fitted table covers include precision-cut corners and elastic edges for secure attachment to standard rectangular tables, creating a sleek, tailored appearance that stays in place during events.

Table throws receive clean-finished hems on all sides, providing elegant full-coverage draping that reaches the floor for maximum visual impact. The weighted hem construction ensures proper hang and stability, even in air-conditioned venues with airflow.

Table runners feature precise length measurements with decorative end treatments that lay flat and maintain their position throughout your event. All finishing work is completed using commercial-grade techniques to withstand the rigors of professional use while maintaining a polished appearance that reflects your brand's attention to quality and detail.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Production Times for Fabric Table Covers

Choose from flexible production schedules designed to meet your event timeline requirements. Standard production time is 3 business days, providing ample time for quality printing and finishing while maintaining cost efficiency for most projects.

Rush production options are available for urgent needs: 1-day production for last-minute events, 2-day production for tight schedules, and 5-day production for larger quantities or complex designs. All production times begin after artwork approval and exclude shipping time.

Our streamlined production process includes digital proofing, print preparation, dye sublimation printing, finishing, and quality inspection. Track your fabric table covers through every production stage using our live order tracking system for complete transparency and peace of mind.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Payment Options for Fabric Table Covers

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and business checks for fabric table cover orders. Secure online payment processing ensures your transaction information remains protected throughout the ordering process.

Corporate accounts are available with net payment terms for qualifying businesses, streamlining the procurement process for repeat orders and bulk purchases. Account setup includes dedicated customer service support and streamlined reorder capabilities.

For large quantity orders, flexible payment arrangements can be discussed with our sales team. All orders are processed immediately upon payment confirmation, ensuring your fabric table covers enter production without delay while maintaining our fast turnaround commitments.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Shipping Guidelines for Fabric Table Covers

Fast, reliable shipping ensures your fabric table covers arrive when and where you need them. Standard shipping typically delivers within 3-5 business days, while expedited options include next-day and 2-day delivery for time-sensitive events.

All fabric table covers are carefully folded and packaged in protective shipping materials to prevent damage during transit. Lightweight fabric construction keeps shipping costs minimal while ensuring your products arrive in perfect condition.

Free shipping is available on qualifying orders, and bulk shipments can be arranged for large quantities. Track your shipment from our facility to your door using provided tracking numbers, with delivery confirmation available for added security and peace of mind.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Common Uses for Fabric Table Covers

Trade shows and exhibitions represent the primary application for custom fabric table covers, where professional presentation directly impacts lead generation and brand perception. These covers transform standard venue tables into branded display platforms that attract visitors and communicate professionalism.

Corporate events, conferences, and business meetings benefit from the polished appearance fabric table covers provide. Registration tables, product displays, and hospitality areas all gain enhanced visual appeal and brand consistency through coordinated table covering solutions.

Wedding receptions, graduation parties, and anniversary celebrations utilize fabric table covers to create elegant, cohesive décor themes. The ability to customize colors and graphics allows perfect coordination with existing décor elements. Educational institutions frequently use them for recruiting events, job fairs, and alumni gatherings where professional presentation supports institutional reputation and outreach goals.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Artwork Requirements for Fabric Table Covers

Submit artwork in high-resolution formats including AI, EPS, PDF, or PSD files for optimal printing results. Vector graphics are preferred for logos and text elements, ensuring crisp reproduction at any size on your fabric table covers.

Our design team provides free digital proofing services, allowing you to review and approve your fabric table cover design before production begins. This process ensures color accuracy, proper sizing, and design placement meet your exact specifications.

Need design assistance? Our professional graphic designers can create custom layouts, incorporate your branding elements, and optimize artwork for dye sublimation printing. From simple logo placement to complex multi-color designs, we provide comprehensive design support to ensure your fabric table covers achieve maximum visual impact and professional presentation quality.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional Fabric Table Cover Services

Beyond exceptional product quality, Banners.com provides comprehensive support services that ensure your fabric table cover project succeeds from concept to completion. Our experienced team understands the unique requirements of trade shows, corporate events, and special occasions, offering guidance on sizing, design optimization, and coordinated branding solutions.

Complement your fabric table covers with our extensive range of display products. Custom car magnets and custom fridge magnets make excellent promotional giveaways at events where your branded table covers create the perfect display platform.

Our commitment to customer satisfaction extends throughout the entire process, from initial consultation through post-event support. Experience the difference that professional-grade fabric table covers make in elevating your brand presentation and creating lasting impressions with your target audience.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What makes your fabric table covers different from competitors?

Our fabric table covers use advanced dye sublimation printing that infuses ink directly into fabric fibers, creating vibrant colors that won't crack, peel, or fade. This process, combined with premium banner soft fabric and reinforced stitching, delivers superior durability and professional appearance that maintains quality through repeated use and washing cycles.

How do I determine the correct size for my fabric table cover?

Measure your table's length, width, and height to select the appropriate size. Fitted covers require exact dimensions for proper fit, while table throws typically extend 6-12 inches beyond table edges for elegant draping. Our customer service team can help you choose the perfect size and style for your specific requirements.

What file formats do you accept for custom artwork on fabric table covers?

We accept high-resolution AI, EPS, PDF, PSD, and JPEG files for optimal printing results. Vector graphics work best for logos and text elements. Our design team provides free digital proofing and can assist with artwork optimization to ensure your fabric table covers achieve maximum visual impact and color accuracy.

Can fabric table covers be cleaned and reused for multiple events?

Yes, our fabric table covers are machine washable in cold water on gentle cycle and designed for repeated professional use. The dye sublimation printing process creates permanent color that won't fade or wash out. Air dry first, then tumble dry on low if needed to remove wrinkles.

Do you offer rush production for last-minute events?

Yes, we provide 1-day and 2-day rush production options for urgent fabric table cover orders. Combined with next-day shipping, you can receive your custom table covers within 2-3 days of artwork approval. Rush services ensure you meet tight event deadlines without compromising quality or professional appearance.

Business Magnets Product Overview

Business Magnets Material Options

Our business magnets utilize premium 30-mil magnetic sheeting that provides exceptional adhesion strength while remaining easily removable. This professional-grade material maintains consistent magnetic pull across the entire surface, ensuring secure attachment during transport and weather exposure.
