The material thickness ensures reliable holding power without leaving residue when repositioned, making these magnets perfect for businesses requiring frequent advertising updates or seasonal promotional campaigns alongside custom car magnets.

``` ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ```html

Business Magnets Finishing Options

Standard rounded corner finishing provides optimal aerodynamics for vehicle-mounted business magnets, reducing wind resistance that could cause lifting or detachment during highway speeds. This finishing option extends magnet lifespan by preventing corner damage from airflow turbulence.

Contour cutting allows business magnets to follow specific shapes including logos, text outlines, or custom designs. This premium finishing option creates unique promotional pieces that stand out from standard rectangular formats while maintaining full magnetic functionality.

All finishing options include edge sealing to prevent lamination separation and moisture infiltration. Damaged shipments require return of defective products for replacement processing. Lost packages receive replacement after shipping company confirms loss, typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery date.

``` ## 11) COMMON USES TAB ```html

Common Uses for Business Magnets

Vehicle advertising represents the most popular application for business magnets, providing mobile marketing for service companies, delivery businesses, and professional services. Magnetic vehicle signs offer removable branding without permanent vehicle modification.

Office and retail displays utilize business magnets for changeable information boards, promotional announcements, and seasonal marketing messages. The repositionable nature allows for frequent content updates without surface damage.

Trade show and event marketing benefits from portable magnetic displays that attach to metal booth structures, appliances, or magnetic presentation boards. Easy transport and setup make them ideal for traveling marketing teams.

``` ## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT ```html

Why Choose Custom Business Magnets

Custom business magnets deliver exceptional return on investment through reusable, repositionable advertising that maintains professional appearance over extended periods. Unlike permanent signage solutions, magnetic advertising adapts to changing business needs, seasonal promotions, and evolving marketing strategies.

Professional-grade materials and full-color printing capabilities ensure your business magnets represent your brand with clarity and durability. Weather-resistant lamination protects against fading, scratching, and environmental damage that compromises less robust promotional materials.

Flexible sizing options accommodate diverse marketing applications from compact contact information magnets to large promotional displays. The combination of strong magnetic adhesion and easy removability provides advertising versatility unavailable with traditional permanent signage.

Banners.com's expertise in magnetic printing, combined with comprehensive finishing options and reliable production schedules, ensures your custom business magnets meet professional standards while supporting your marketing objectives effectively alongside complementary products like custom fridge magnets for comprehensive promotional campaigns.

``` ## 14) FAQ ```html

Business Magnets FAQ

What material are custom business magnets made from?

Our business magnets use premium 30-mil magnetic sheeting with UV-resistant lamination for durability. This professional-grade material provides strong magnetic adhesion while remaining easily removable without surface damage. The lamination protects against fading, scratching, and weather exposure, ensuring long-lasting promotional effectiveness for indoor and outdoor applications.

What surfaces do business magnets stick to effectively?

Business magnets adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including steel vehicle doors, appliances, filing cabinets, and metal display systems. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or non-magnetic materials. Before ordering, test your intended surface with a small magnet to confirm magnetic receptivity and ensure secure attachment for your specific application needs.

Can business magnets be cut to custom shapes?

Yes, we offer contour cutting to follow specific shapes including logos, text outlines, and custom designs. Standard options include rounded corners for vehicle applications and square cuts for clean geometric presentations. Rounded corners provide better aerodynamics for mobile advertising, while contour cutting creates unique promotional pieces that enhance brand recognition.

How do I prepare artwork for business magnet printing?

Vector-based files like .eps with outlined fonts produce optimal results, though high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files also print effectively. Our design team provides artwork assistance, and order proofs allow design verification before production. For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate brand color reproduction through professional consultation.

What's the maximum size available for custom business magnets?

Business magnets can be printed up to 24" x 24" maximum dimensions, accommodating various promotional needs from compact contact information to large advertising displays. Custom sizing options provide flexibility for specific marketing requirements, vehicle dimensions, or display space constraints while maintaining strong magnetic adhesion across the entire surface area.

How long do business magnets maintain their effectiveness?

With proper care and appropriate surface application, business magnets maintain strong adhesion and vibrant graphics for several years. UV-resistant lamination prevents fading and weather damage, while the durable magnetic material retains holding strength through repeated repositioning. Regular cleaning and storage on flat surfaces when not in use extends their promotional lifespan significantly.

Custom Dry Erase Magnets for Every Application

Our custom dry erase magnets offer the perfect solution for organized planning and dynamic messaging in homes, offices, classrooms, and commercial spaces. Each magnet features professional-grade 30 mil magnetic material with protective lamination, ensuring your writing surface stays smooth and durable through countless uses. The full-color printing capabilities allow you to incorporate logos, branding, calendars, or custom designs while maintaining excellent dry erase functionality.

These versatile magnets stick securely to any magnetic-receptive surface, including refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, and metal doors. Whether you're creating weekly meal planners, project tracking boards, or promotional materials that customers can interact with, our dry erase magnets provide both visual appeal and practical functionality. The professional lamination protects your printed design while creating an optimal writing surface compatible with standard dry erase markers.

Available in sizes up to 24" x 24", these magnets accommodate everything from compact reminder notes to large-format planning tools. Each magnet is precision-cut with your choice of rounded corners for enhanced airflow and durability, or square cuts for a clean, professional appearance.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Dry Erase Magnets Material Options

Our dry erase magnets are constructed with premium 30 mil magnetic material that provides strong adhesion to ferrous surfaces while maintaining flexibility and durability. The magnetic base ensures reliable attachment to refrigerators, metal filing cabinets, whiteboards, and other magnetic-receptive surfaces without leaving residue or causing damage.

Each magnet includes professional lamination that serves dual purposes: protecting your custom printed design and creating an optimal dry erase writing surface. This protective layer resists scratches, moisture, and daily wear while ensuring smooth marker application and easy erasing. The lamination process enhances color vibrancy and prevents ink bleeding, maintaining your design's professional appearance through extended use.

Our full-color printing process delivers vibrant, accurate reproduction of logos, graphics, text, and complex designs. The printing is applied before lamination, ensuring your custom elements won't chip, fade, or wear away with regular erasing. For specialized applications requiring specific magnetic strength or thickness, our team can provide guidance on the best material configuration for your intended use and surface type.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Dry Erase Magnets Finishing & Cut Options

Choose from three professional finishing options designed to optimize your dry erase magnets' performance and appearance. Rounded corners represent our standard finishing choice, engineered to improve airflow dynamics around the magnet edges, reducing lift and enhancing adhesion reliability. This finishing option proves especially valuable for magnets used on vertical surfaces or in high-traffic areas.

Square cut finishing provides clean, precise edges ideal for applications requiring exact alignment or professional presentation. This option works well for magnets used in office environments, retail displays, or situations where multiple magnets need to fit together seamlessly. The sharp corners create a polished, businesslike appearance suitable for corporate branding applications.

Contour cutting allows for custom shapes that follow your design elements, creating unique promotional tools or branded items that stand out from traditional rectangular magnets. This option supports complex shapes while maintaining the structural integrity needed for reliable magnetic adhesion. All finishing options include the same high-quality lamination process, ensuring consistent dry erase functionality regardless of your chosen edge treatment.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Dry Erase Magnets Production Times

Select from four production timelines designed to meet your scheduling needs and budget requirements. Our 1 Business Day Priority option ensures rapid turnaround for urgent projects, while 2 Business Days Express provides quick delivery with slightly more flexibility. The popular 3 Business Days Standard option offers the ideal balance of speed and value for most custom dry erase magnet orders.

Our 5 Business Days Saver timeline provides cost-effective production for projects with flexible deadlines. All production times begin when artwork approval is complete and payment is processed. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST start production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available for qualifying orders - contact our customer service team to discuss your specific timeline requirements.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Payment Options for Dry Erase Magnets

All custom dry erase magnets require payment before production begins, ensuring your order moves quickly through our manufacturing process. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate processing and faster production starts.

Check payments are also accepted and must be received and cleared before production begins. This option works well for larger orders or organizations requiring specific payment procedures. Your credit card will only be charged after you approve your final order details and artwork, giving you complete control over the transaction timing.

For volume orders or corporate accounts, please contact our customer service team to discuss additional payment options and potential account terms that may streamline your ordering process for future dry erase magnet purchases.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Dry Erase Magnets Shipping Guidelines

Your custom dry erase magnets ship via UPS Ground unless you specify alternative shipping methods during checkout. We provide 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of the United States, with tracking numbers provided once your package ships. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination.

Available shipping options include Standard (3-5 business days), Three Day, Two Day, and Overnight delivery. UPS Overnight AM service ensures next-day morning delivery for time-sensitive projects. Economy shipping is available for cost-conscious orders, though this may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination.

International shipping is available with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international labels from USPS and UPS. All dry erase magnets are manufactured in our Minnesota facility, ensuring consistent quality control and reliable shipping timelines throughout North America.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Common Uses for Dry Erase Magnets

Custom dry erase magnets excel in educational environments, serving as interactive teaching tools, student assignment trackers, and classroom management systems. Teachers use them for daily schedules, behavior charts, and collaborative learning activities that students can actively participate in and modify throughout lessons.

Business applications include project status boards, employee scheduling systems, and customer communication tools that combine branding with functionality. Restaurants use them for daily specials, while offices employ them for meeting room booking, task assignments, and team goal tracking. Similar to truck magnetic signs, these magnets provide visible, updateable messaging that serves practical business needs.

Home organization benefits from meal planning magnets, chore charts, and family calendars that keep everyone informed and engaged. Unlike static custom fridge magnets, dry erase versions adapt to changing schedules and priorities. Healthcare facilities use them for patient information, room status indicators, and staff communications that require frequent updates while maintaining professional appearance and hygiene standards.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Dry Erase Magnets Artwork Requirements

Vector-based files such as .eps with outlined fonts provide the highest print quality for your custom dry erase magnets. High-resolution PDF and JPG files also produce excellent results when properly prepared. Our design team can evaluate your artwork and provide recommendations for optimal printing results.

Order proofs are available to verify artwork, pricing, and order details before production begins. This service ensures complete accuracy but requires your approval before manufacturing starts. For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System provides precise color matching verification, particularly valuable for branded materials requiring exact color specifications.

If you need design assistance, our professional graphic designers can help create or optimize your artwork. We can also handle the entire design process based on your specifications, ensuring your dry erase magnets meet both aesthetic and functional requirements for your intended application.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Custom Dry Erase Magnets for Business and Home

Dry erase magnets represent the evolution of traditional planning tools, combining magnetic convenience with interactive functionality that adapts to your changing needs. Unlike permanent signage, these versatile tools grow with your projects, schedules, and creative requirements while maintaining professional appearance and reliable performance.

The laminated surface technology ensures consistent marker performance and easy erasing without ghosting or staining, making these magnets suitable for high-use environments. Whether you're managing complex projects, teaching interactive lessons, or organizing family activities, the ability to update content instantly while maintaining visual appeal sets these magnets apart from static alternatives like custom photo magnets.

Professional installation requires only a clean, magnetic-receptive surface, making these magnets ideal for temporary displays, seasonal promotions, or applications where permanent mounting isn't practical. The durable construction withstands daily use while the custom printing ensures your branding or design elements remain vibrant and professional throughout the magnet's extended lifespan.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What materials are used in your custom dry erase magnets?

Our dry erase magnets feature 30 mil magnetic material with professional lamination over full-color printing. The magnetic base provides strong adhesion to ferrous surfaces, while the protective lamination creates an optimal writing surface that resists wear, moisture, and scratches. This construction ensures reliable performance through thousands of write-and-erase cycles while maintaining vibrant printed graphics.

Can I order custom sizes and shapes for dry erase magnets?

Yes, we offer custom sizing up to 24" x 24" to accommodate various applications from compact reminder notes to large planning boards. Shape options include standard rectangular with rounded or square corners, plus custom contour cutting that follows your design elements. Our team can help determine the optimal size and shape configuration for your intended use and magnetic surface requirements.

What file formats work best for dry erase magnet artwork?

Vector files like .eps with outlined fonts produce the highest quality results, though high-resolution PDF and JPG files also work well. Our prepress team reviews all artwork for print optimization and can provide recommendations for improvements. If you need design assistance, our professional graphic designers can create custom artwork or optimize existing files for best printing results.

How do I clean and maintain dry erase magnets?

Use standard dry erase markers and clean with dry erasers or soft cloths for regular maintenance. For thorough cleaning, use mild soap and water or dry erase board cleaners, avoiding abrasive materials that could damage the laminated surface. Proper maintenance ensures long-term performance and prevents marker ghosting. The laminated surface resists staining and maintains smooth writing characteristics through extended use.

What surfaces work best with dry erase magnets?

Dry erase magnets adhere to any magnetic-receptive surface including steel filing cabinets, refrigerators, whiteboards with steel backing, and metal doors. They won't stick to aluminum, plastic, or non-ferrous materials. Before ordering, verify your intended surface accepts magnets by testing with a standard refrigerator magnet. The 30 mil thickness provides strong holding power on appropriate surfaces.

Free digital proofing is included with all orders, typically delivered within 2-4 hours during business days. Proof approval must be received before production begins, ensuring your custom retractable banner meets exact specifications and quality expectations.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for secure online payment processing. PayPal checkout provides additional convenience for customers preferring alternative payment methods. All transactions utilize SSL encryption for complete security.

Purchase orders are accepted for established business accounts with approved credit terms. Net 30 payment terms are available for qualifying commercial customers with verified business credentials. Bulk order discounts apply automatically for quantities exceeding standard minimums.

Tax-exempt customers can upload certificates during checkout to remove applicable sales tax. International orders require payment in advance with additional shipping calculations provided before order completion. Customer service representatives assist with payment questions and processing issues.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Free standard shipping is included on retractable banner orders over $99 within the continental United States. Standard delivery typically arrives within 5-7 business days via UPS Ground service. Expedited shipping options include 3-day select, 2-day air, and next-day delivery for urgent project requirements.

International shipping is available to most countries with calculated rates based on destination and package weight. Customs documentation is prepared automatically for international shipments. Remote locations may require additional transit time or shipping surcharges.

Order tracking information is provided automatically via email once shipment processing begins. Live order tracking allows real-time status monitoring throughout the production and delivery process, ensuring you stay informed about your custom retractable banner progress.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Trade shows and conventions represent the most popular application for retractable banners, where easy setup and professional appearance attract booth visitors effectively. The portable design allows exhibitors to transport multiple displays without excessive weight or bulk, while the professional graphics create strong brand presence.

Retail environments utilize retractable banners for promotional campaigns, seasonal displays, and directional signage. The ability to quickly change messaging makes them ideal for businesses with frequently updated promotions or product launches.

Corporate events, job fairs, real estate open houses, and restaurant promotions benefit from the professional appearance and convenient portability. Educational institutions use them for recruitment events, while healthcare facilities employ them for wayfinding and informational displays. The versatility makes retractable banners suitable for virtually any indoor or temporary outdoor promotional need.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Upload print-ready artwork in high-resolution PDF, AI, or PSD formats at 150 DPI minimum for optimal print quality. Include 0.125" bleed area around all edges to ensure proper finishing without white borders. CMYK color mode produces the most accurate color matching for professional results.

Free design templates are available for all retractable banner sizes, providing proper dimensions and bleed specifications. Our online design tool allows customization of templates with your text, images, and brand colors. Professional design services are available for customers requiring custom artwork creation.

Artwork approval is required before production begins, with free digital proofs provided for review. Minor text edits and color adjustments are included at no charge. Our design team reviews all uploaded files for print suitability and contacts customers if resolution or formatting improvements are recommended.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Complete your trade show setup with complementary display products designed to work seamlessly with retractable banners. Consider adding simpo sign displays for additional messaging or directional information. Table covers and backdrop displays create cohesive branding throughout your exhibit space.

Replacement banners are available for existing retractable banner stands, allowing you to update messaging for different events while reusing the hardware investment. This cost-effective approach enables seasonal promotions, event-specific messaging, or brand updates without purchasing complete new display systems.

Professional installation and design consultation services ensure your retractable banner displays achieve maximum impact. Our experienced team provides guidance on optimal placement, sizing recommendations, and artwork optimization for your specific application requirements and venue constraints.

## 14) FAQ
**How quickly can I receive my custom retractable banner?** Rush production options include next-day and 2-day turnaround for most standard sizes and materials. Combined with expedited shipping, you can receive your custom banner stand within 2-3 business days from artwork approval. Standard production takes 3-5 days with free shipping on orders over $99. **What's the difference between vinyl and fabric materials for retractable banners?** Vinyl materials offer superior durability and weather resistance, making them ideal for frequent use and outdoor applications. Fabric provides a premium matte finish that eliminates glare under bright lights, perfect for upscale retail and corporate environments. Both materials deliver excellent color reproduction and smooth retraction operation. **Can I order replacement banners for my existing retractable stand?** Yes, replacement banners are available for all our retractable banner stand models without purchasing new hardware. Simply specify your existing stand model when ordering. This allows you to update messaging for different events, seasons, or promotions while maximizing your display investment. **What artwork specifications do you recommend for best print quality?** Submit artwork at 150 DPI minimum resolution in CMYK color mode with 0.125" bleed area. PDF, AI, and PSD formats work best for professional printing. Free design templates ensure proper dimensions, and our team reviews all files for print optimization before production begins. **Are retractable banner stands suitable for outdoor use?** Most retractable banners are designed primarily for indoor use or temporary outdoor applications in protected areas. For extended outdoor use, consider our 14oz vinyl material option which provides enhanced weather resistance. Secure the base properly in windy conditions to prevent tipping. **Do retractable banners come with carrying cases?** Yes, all retractable banner stands include a padded carrying case for transport and storage protection. The cases feature convenient handles and secure closures to protect your investment between events. The compact design makes transportation easy for busy professionals managing multiple display locations.

Custom Bumper Magnets

Transform your vehicle into mobile advertising with custom bumper magnets designed for maximum durability and professional appeal. Our weatherproof bumper magnets feature full-color printing on premium 30-mil magnetic material, delivering vibrant graphics that withstand outdoor conditions while protecting your vehicle's finish. Perfect for businesses, campaigns, and personal messaging. See also [yard letter and number signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-letter-and-number-signs).

## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS - Size: Custom Bumper Magnet Dimensions - Material: Magnetic Material Options - Finishing: Cut Style & Corners - Quantity: Order Volume - Production: Turnaround Time ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Professional Bumper Magnets for Every Vehicle

Custom bumper magnets provide the perfect solution for removable vehicle advertising that travels wherever you go. Unlike permanent decals, these magnetic solutions allow you to promote your business, support causes, or display personal messages without compromising your vehicle's resale value. Our bumper magnets feature professional-grade 30-mil magnetic material with full-color printing capabilities, ensuring your design maintains vibrant colors and crisp details through all weather conditions.

Each bumper magnet includes protective lamination that guards against UV fading, moisture damage, and everyday wear. The strong magnetic hold keeps your message securely in place during highway driving while remaining easily removable when needed. Our custom car magnets are manufactured with rounded corners as standard, promoting better airflow and reducing wind lift for enhanced highway performance.

Available in custom sizes up to 24" x 24", these bumper magnets accommodate everything from compact promotional messages to large-format business advertising. Professional businesses rely on our magnetic signs for cost-effective fleet branding, while individuals use them for event promotion, political campaigns, and personal expression.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Bumper Magnets Material & Construction Options

Our custom bumper magnets utilize premium 30-mil magnetic material engineered specifically for automotive applications. This professional-grade thickness provides optimal magnetic strength while maintaining flexibility for curved bumper surfaces. The magnetic base features consistent polarity distribution, ensuring reliable adhesion across the entire surface area without weak spots or lifting corners.

Every bumper magnet includes protective lamination applied over the printed surface, creating a weatherproof barrier against rain, snow, UV rays, and road debris. This lamination process extends the lifespan of your graphics while maintaining color vibrancy throughout extended outdoor exposure. The smooth laminated finish also facilitates easy cleaning and maintenance.

Before ordering, verify that your vehicle's bumper contains magnetic-receptive steel. Our magnets will not adhere to aluminum, plastic, or composite bumper materials commonly found on newer vehicles. For non-magnetic surfaces, consider our truck magnetic signs designed for steel door panels and body sections.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Bumper Magnets Finishing & Cut Options

Standard bumper magnets feature rounded corner finishing, the recommended option for highway driving and extended outdoor use. Rounded corners create improved airflow around the magnet edges, significantly reducing wind lift and preventing unwanted removal during high-speed travel. This finishing style also prevents corner damage from impact and handling.

For specialized applications, we offer square cut and custom contour cutting options. Square cut bumper magnets provide clean, sharp edges ideal for text-heavy designs and professional business applications. Custom contour cutting follows your design's outline, creating unique shapes that maximize visual impact while eliminating excess magnetic material.

Contour cut options work exceptionally well for logo-based designs, creating professional branded magnets that stand out from standard rectangular formats. However, consider that complex shapes may have reduced magnetic contact area, potentially affecting adhesion strength during extreme weather conditions or high-speed driving situations.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Bumper Magnets Production Times & Turnaround

We offer flexible production schedules ranging from 1 to 5 business days to accommodate urgent deadlines and budget-conscious timelines. Priority 1-day production handles time-sensitive orders, while our popular 3-day standard option balances speed with cost-effectiveness for most bumper magnet projects.

Production time begins once artwork approval is complete and file upload finishes. Orders requiring design revisions or proof approval will start production timing from final approval confirmation. Express 2-day production works perfectly for promotional events and campaign launches with moderate lead times.

Our 5-day saver option reduces costs for large quantity orders or projects without deadline pressure. All production times exclude shipping duration, so factor delivery time when planning your project timeline. Emergency same-day production may be available for qualifying orders through customer service consultation.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Payment & Ordering Bumper Magnets

All custom bumper magnets require full payment before production begins, ensuring immediate processing once your order is approved. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for instant payment processing and immediate production scheduling.

Check payments are also accepted but must clear before production starts, adding additional processing time to your project timeline. Your credit card will not be charged until you approve your final order details and artwork, providing complete control over your purchase decision.

For large quantity orders or repeat business customers, contact our customer service team to discuss available payment terms and bulk pricing options. Our flexible payment processing accommodates both individual orders and corporate purchasing requirements with appropriate documentation.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Bumper Magnets Shipping Guidelines

Standard shipping utilizes UPS Ground service, delivering to 90% of the United States within 1-3 business days from our Minnesota production facility. Tracking information is automatically provided once your bumper magnets ship, allowing real-time delivery monitoring and planning.

Expedited shipping options include overnight, 2-day, and 3-day services for time-sensitive projects. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination, with additional charges applying to oversized orders requiring special handling or multiple packages.

International shipping requires customer-provided labels and customs documentation, with USPS and UPS as accepted carriers. Economy shipping adds 5-10 additional days but reduces costs for non-urgent deliveries. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for specific shipping questions or special delivery requirements.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Business & Personal Bumper Magnets Uses

Business professionals utilize bumper magnets for mobile advertising campaigns that transform personal and company vehicles into moving billboards. Service businesses like contractors, real estate agents, and consultants rely on bumper magnets to generate leads and increase brand visibility throughout their local markets without permanent vehicle modifications.

Political campaigns and nonprofit organizations leverage bumper magnets for candidate promotion and cause advocacy, allowing supporters to display temporary messages during election cycles or awareness campaigns. The removable nature enables message updates and prevents permanent vehicle alterations that might concern supporters.

Personal applications include family announcements, event promotion, sports team support, and hobby group identification. Wedding announcements, graduation celebrations, and milestone events become mobile celebrations with custom bumper magnets. Consider our custom fridge magnets for indoor promotional materials and custom dry erase magnets for interactive business applications.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Bumper Magnets Artwork Requirements

Vector-based files like .eps formats with outlined fonts produce the highest quality results for bumper magnet printing. High-resolution PDF and JPG files are also acceptable, provided they meet minimum 300 DPI resolution requirements for crisp, professional output.

Our graphic design team can assist with file optimization and quality assessment if you're uncertain about your artwork specifications. Professional design services are available for customers requiring complete design creation or significant modifications to existing artwork.

Order proofs allow artwork review and approval before production begins, ensuring complete satisfaction with your final design. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, providing precise color accuracy for brand-specific requirements. Contact customer service for color matching consultation and detailed specifications.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional Bumper Magnets for Every Vehicle

Custom bumper magnets represent the ideal balance between effective advertising and vehicle protection, offering businesses and individuals a professional marketing solution without permanent modifications. Our premium 30-mil magnetic material ensures reliable performance across diverse weather conditions while maintaining easy removal when circumstances change.

Whether you're launching a new business campaign, supporting a political candidate, or announcing a special event, bumper magnets provide the flexibility and professional appearance your message deserves. The combination of full-color printing capabilities, protective lamination, and custom sizing options creates unlimited possibilities for effective mobile advertising.

With production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days and comprehensive shipping options, your custom bumper magnets can be ready when you need them. Trust our two decades of printing expertise to deliver the quality and service your project demands, backed by professional customer support throughout the entire ordering process.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Will bumper magnets stick to my vehicle's bumper?

Bumper magnets require magnetic-receptive steel surfaces to adhere properly. Many modern vehicles feature aluminum, plastic, or composite bumpers that won't hold magnets. Test with a small magnet first, or consider our truck magnetic signs for steel door panels and body sections instead.

How long do custom bumper magnets last outdoors?

Our laminated bumper magnets typically last 3-5 years with proper care and maintenance. UV-resistant inks and protective lamination guard against fading and weather damage. Regular cleaning and removal during extreme weather extends lifespan significantly while maintaining professional appearance.

Can I upload my own design for bumper magnets?

Yes, we accept various file formats including vector files (.eps), high-resolution PDFs, and JPG images. Vector files with outlined fonts produce the best results. Our design team can review your artwork quality and provide optimization recommendations before production begins.

Are bumper magnets safe for painted vehicle surfaces?

Our magnetic material is specifically designed for automotive use and won't damage factory paint finishes when properly maintained. Remove magnets periodically for cleaning both the magnet and vehicle surface to prevent dirt accumulation. Avoid sliding magnets across painted surfaces during installation or removal.

Do you offer bulk pricing for large bumper magnet orders?

Yes, quantity discounts apply to larger orders, with significant savings available for business and organizational purchases. Contact our customer service team to discuss volume pricing, custom quotes, and extended payment terms for qualifying bulk orders and repeat business customers.

Can bumper magnets go through automatic car washes?

We recommend removing bumper magnets before entering automatic car washes to prevent potential damage or loss. High-pressure water, brushes, and chemical cleaners can affect magnetic adhesion and potentially damage the printed surface. Hand washing around magnets is the safest cleaning method.

## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Stand Type | Size Options | Material Selection | Finishing Options | Artwork Upload ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Our banner stands collection offers versatile display solutions engineered for professional presentations across diverse environments. From compact tabletop models to expansive outdoor A-frame configurations, each stand combines lightweight portability with robust construction. Retractors feature spring-loaded mechanisms for effortless setup and breakdown, while X-stands provide tension-based banner mounting ideal for frequent display changes.

These banner holders accommodate various banner materials including 13 oz vinyl, no-curl vinyl, and fabric options. Weather-resistant outdoor models withstand wind and moisture, while indoor stands focus on sleek aesthetics and quick assembly. Each stand includes hardware designed for repeated use, making them cost-effective for ongoing marketing campaigns and events.

Professional-grade aluminum construction ensures durability without excessive weight, facilitating easy transport between venues. The modular design allows for banner replacement without purchasing new hardware, providing long-term value for businesses requiring frequent message updates.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Banner stands accommodate three primary material options, each optimized for specific applications and environments. The 13 oz scrim vinyl provides excellent durability for outdoor displays, featuring weather-resistant properties and vibrant color reproduction. This material handles wind stress effectively while maintaining banner tension across various stand configurations.

The 14 oz no-curl vinyl eliminates edge rolling and maintains flat presentation throughout the banner's lifespan. This premium option works exceptionally well with a frames and retractable stands where smooth banner surfaces are essential for professional appearance.

Banner Soft fabric offers a premium textile finish ideal for indoor trade show displays and high-end retail environments. This material provides superior color saturation and eliminates glare under indoor lighting conditions. Each material option includes full-color digital printing with fade-resistant inks designed for extended display periods.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Professional finishing ensures optimal banner performance and longevity across all stand configurations. Standard hemming and grommeting provide secure attachment points for X-stands and A-frame displays, while pole pockets accommodate retractable banner mechanisms seamlessly.

Double-sided printing capabilities allow maximum message visibility for outdoor banner stands positioned in high-traffic areas. This finishing option requires careful alignment to ensure consistent messaging across both banner surfaces.

Reinforcement options include corner strengthening and stress point reinforcement for banners subjected to frequent handling or outdoor conditions. Wind slits can be incorporated into outdoor banner designs to reduce wind resistance while maintaining visual impact. Each finishing technique is selected based on the specific stand type and intended application environment.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Banner stands production schedules accommodate urgent display requirements and planned campaigns. Standard production completes within 3-5 business days, including banner printing and hardware assembly verification. Rush production options reduce turnaround to 1-2 business days for time-sensitive events and last-minute display needs.

Custom sizing and specialized finishing requirements may extend production timelines by 1-2 additional days. Hardware components typically ship within 24 hours of order confirmation, allowing separate banner and stand delivery when immediate setup is required. Production begins upon artwork approval and payment processing completion.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Flexible payment solutions support both individual purchases and bulk display orders. Major credit cards, PayPal, and business accounts streamline the ordering process for immediate production scheduling. Net payment terms are available for qualified business customers requiring multiple banner stand configurations.

Volume pricing automatically applies to orders containing multiple stands or banner sets, providing cost savings for comprehensive display campaigns. Custom quotes accommodate specialized requirements including oversized displays and unique hardware modifications. Payment processing occurs immediately upon order confirmation, ensuring rapid production initiation.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Banner stands ship via ground transportation with expedited options available for urgent delivery requirements. Compact packaging reduces shipping costs while providing adequate protection for hardware components and printed banners during transit.

Retractable banner stands and tabletop displays ship in protective cases suitable for ongoing transport and storage. Larger outdoor stands may require freight delivery depending on size and quantity. Tracking information is provided immediately upon shipment, allowing delivery coordination for event schedules. Standard shipping typically delivers within 5-7 business days, with express options reducing delivery time to 2-3 business days.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Banner stands serve diverse marketing and informational applications across multiple industries and environments. Trade show displays utilize retractable and X-stand configurations for booth presentations, product launches, and brand awareness campaigns. Retail environments benefit from tabletop stands for product promotions and seasonal messaging changes.

Outdoor applications include sidewalk advertising with signicade deluxe a frame white configurations, event directional signage, and real estate property marketing. Churches, schools, and nonprofit organizations utilize banner stands for event announcements, fundraising campaigns, and community outreach initiatives.

Restaurant and hospitality businesses employ banner displays for menu promotions, special events, and seasonal offerings. The portability and quick setup capabilities make banner stands ideal for farmers markets, outdoor festivals, and temporary promotional locations.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Professional artwork requirements ensure optimal banner reproduction and stand compatibility. Digital files should be submitted in high-resolution formats including PDF, AI, or EPS with embedded fonts and converted text. Minimum 300 DPI resolution maintains image clarity across all banner sizes and viewing distances.

Template downloads provide exact dimensions for each stand configuration, eliminating guesswork and ensuring proper banner fitting. Bleed areas and safe zones protect important text and graphics from trimming during production. Color matching services accommodate specific brand requirements using Pantone color references. Artwork approval is required before production begins, with revision opportunities available during the proofing process.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional banner stands represent a versatile and cost-effective solution for businesses requiring portable display capabilities across multiple environments. The combination of durable hardware construction and high-quality banner materials ensures consistent performance throughout extended use periods. Whether supporting indoor presentations or outdoor marketing initiatives, these display systems provide reliable brand visibility.

Investment in quality banner stands yields long-term value through reusable hardware and replaceable banner options. Simpo sign configurations and other stand types accommodate evolving marketing messages without requiring complete system replacement. This flexibility supports dynamic marketing strategies while maintaining consistent professional presentation standards across all display applications.

## 14) FAQ

What's included with a banner stand?

Each banner stand includes complete hardware assembly, one full-color printed banner sized to fit your selected stand, and detailed setup instructions. Carrying cases are included with retractable models for transport protection. Double-sided banner options are available for outdoor A-frame configurations to maximize visibility from multiple directions.

What materials are the banner and stand made from?

Banners are available in 13 oz scrim vinyl for outdoor durability, 14 oz no-curl vinyl for premium presentation, or Banner Soft fabric for indoor displays. Stand hardware utilizes lightweight aluminum construction for portability and corrosion resistance. All materials are selected for repeated use and professional appearance throughout extended display periods.

Are banner stand banners printed in full color?

Yes, all banner stand banners feature full CMYK digital printing with fade-resistant inks designed for extended display periods. Custom Pantone color matching is available for specific brand requirements. High-resolution printing ensures crisp text and vibrant graphics across all banner sizes and material options for professional presentation quality.

Do you sell replacement banners for banner stands?

Replacement banners are available for all stand configurations, allowing message updates without purchasing new hardware. Simply specify your existing stand model when ordering replacement banners to ensure proper sizing and attachment compatibility. This cost-effective approach supports dynamic marketing campaigns with consistent professional hardware.

How do I store my vinyl banner when it's not in use?

Store vinyl banners rolled with the printed side facing outward in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight. Avoid folding, which can create permanent creases. Retractable banner stands include protective cases that maintain proper banner position during storage while protecting the printed surface from damage and contamination.

What are banner stands commonly used for?

Banner stands excel in trade show displays, retail promotions, outdoor advertising, event signage, and directional messaging applications. Their portability and quick setup make them ideal for farmers markets, grand openings, real estate marketing, and temporary promotional campaigns where professional presentation and easy transport are essential requirements.

Create lasting first impressions with professionally printed business cards designed to showcase your brand. Our high-quality business cards feature premium printing on durable 12.4 pt coverstock with your choice of matte or glossy finishes. Whether you're networking at events, building client relationships, or promoting your business, our custom business cards deliver the professional quality you need to stand out in today's competitive marketplace. 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Size: 2" x 3.5" Standard Quantity: Select Amount Material: Premium Coverstock Finish: Matte or Gloss Turnaround: 1-5 Business Days 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Business Cards & Product Overview

Our professional business cards are digitally printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper, delivering exceptional durability and print quality for your networking needs. Each business card features crisp text, vibrant colors, and professional finishing that makes a memorable first impression with clients and prospects.

Available in both matte and glossy finishes, our custom business cards accommodate various design preferences and branding requirements. The matte finish provides an elegant, sophisticated appearance that reduces glare and fingerprints, while our glossy finish offers enhanced color vibrancy and protection against wear.

With flexible production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days, you can choose the turnaround option that best fits your schedule and budget. Our streamlined ordering process includes template design options, file upload capabilities, and professional design assistance to ensure your business cards perfectly represent your brand identity and professional image.

6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Business Cards & Material Options

Our business cards are printed exclusively on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper, providing the ideal balance of durability and professional appearance. This heavyweight paper stock ensures your business cards maintain their shape and quality through repeated handling, networking events, and storage in wallets or cardholders.

The coverstock material features excellent ink absorption properties, resulting in sharp text reproduction and vibrant color saturation that showcases your brand elements effectively. This professional-grade paper stock is specifically chosen for business card applications, offering superior performance compared to standard printing papers.

Our digital printing process on this premium material delivers consistent results across your entire order quantity, ensuring every business card meets our quality standards. The material's smooth surface provides an ideal foundation for both simple text-based designs and complex graphics with multiple colors and design elements.

7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Business Cards & Finishing Options

Choose between two professional finishing options to enhance your business cards' appearance and durability. Our matte coating provides a sophisticated, non-reflective surface that reduces glare and fingerprints while offering excellent write-ability for handwritten notes or signatures.

The glossy finish option delivers enhanced color vibrancy and provides additional protection against moisture, wear, and handling. This finish creates a professional shine that makes colors appear more saturated and images more striking, ideal for business cards featuring photography or bold graphics.

Both finishing options are applied during the printing process to ensure consistent coverage and professional results. The protective coating extends the lifespan of your business cards while maintaining their professional appearance through extended use. Consider your brand image and intended use when selecting the finishing option that best represents your professional identity.

8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Business Cards & Production Times

We offer flexible production schedules to meet your business timeline requirements. Choose from 1-day Priority service for urgent needs, 2-day Express for quick turnaround, 3-day Standard (our most popular option), or 5-day Saver for cost-conscious projects.

Production time begins once your artwork is approved and payment is processed. Orders received after 5:00 PM CST are processed the following business day. If your order requires prepress review or proof approval, production time starts from approval confirmation.

Emergency same-day service may be available in select cases. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss rush options. Remember that total delivery time includes both production time and shipping duration to your location.

9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Business Cards & Payment Options

All business card orders require payment before production begins to ensure timely processing. We accept major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing and quick production turnaround.

Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your order enters production. For detailed information about check payment processing and timing, please contact our customer service team or review our payment policies.

Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your order details. This approval process ensures accuracy and gives you final control over your business card specifications before production begins. For large orders or corporate accounts, please contact us to discuss additional payment arrangements.

10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Business Cards & Shipping Guidelines

Standard shipping via UPS Ground provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States. Expedited shipping options include Overnight, Two Day, and Three Day service for time-sensitive orders. You'll receive tracking information once your business cards ship.

Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination. International orders require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation through USPS or UPS services only. For questions about international shipping, contact our customer service team.

Economy shipping adds 5-10 additional days depending on destination and should include P.O. Box information in the "Address Two" field during checkout. All shipments follow carrier terms and conditions for delays or damage. Our Minnesota facility produces all standard business cards with shipping times calculated from this location.

11) COMMON USES TAB

Business Cards & Common Uses

Professional business cards serve multiple purposes across various business situations. Networking events, trade shows, and conferences provide prime opportunities to distribute business cards and establish new professional connections with potential clients, partners, and industry contacts.

Sales meetings, client presentations, and follow-up communications benefit from professional business cards that reinforce your brand identity. Restaurant owners, real estate professionals, contractors, and service providers rely on business cards for referral marketing and customer retention strategies.

Consider pairing your business cards with other promotional materials like custom fridge magnets for lasting brand visibility or custom car magnets for mobile advertising. Professional business cards remain essential tools for face-to-face marketing and relationship building across all industries and business types.

12) ARTWORK TAB

Business Cards & Artwork Requirements

Submit vector-based files like .eps with fonts converted to outlines for optimal print quality. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files (300 DPI minimum) also produce excellent results when properly prepared for printing specifications.

Include 1/8" bleed on all sides when designing your business cards. Final trimmed size will be 2.00" x 3.50" with the design area extending to 2.25" x 3.75" including bleed. This ensures complete coverage during the cutting process.

Our professional graphic designers provide design assistance for $60 per hour if you need help creating or optimizing your artwork. For color-critical projects, consider our Color Match Proof System to ensure accurate color reproduction. Upload files must be 60 MB or smaller, or contact us for larger file transfer instructions.

13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional Business Cards & Benefits

Investing in professionally printed business cards demonstrates attention to detail and commitment to quality that clients and prospects notice. Our premium printing process and materials create business cards that reflect your professional standards and brand values effectively.

With over 20 years of printing experience, Banners.com delivers consistent quality and reliable service for businesses nationwide. Our streamlined ordering process, flexible production times, and professional customer support ensure your business card project exceeds expectations from design to delivery.

Beyond business cards, consider expanding your promotional materials with yard letter and number signs for location-based marketing or truck magnetic signs for mobile advertising. Professional business cards form the foundation of effective networking and brand representation in today's competitive business environment.

14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the standard business card size in the US?

The standard US business card size is 2" x 3.5" (finished size), which we print with a 2.25" x 3.75" design area including bleed. This size fits perfectly in standard business card holders, wallets, and networking accessories. Our templates are pre-sized to these specifications for easy design setup.

What's the difference between matte and gloss business cards?

Matte business cards feature a non-reflective coating that reduces glare and fingerprints while allowing easy writing on the surface. Glossy cards have a shiny finish that enhances color vibrancy and provides additional protection against moisture. Choose based on your design style and intended use.

How thick are your business cards?

Our business cards are printed on 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock, providing substantial thickness and durability that feels professional in hand. This premium paper weight prevents bending and maintains shape through repeated handling, storage, and networking use while projecting quality and attention to detail.

Can I get same-day printing for business cards?

Emergency same-day service may be available in select cases depending on order complexity and current production schedule. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 before 12 PM CST to discuss same-day options. Our standard 1-day Priority service provides reliable next-business-day completion for most orders.

What file formats work best for business card printing?

Vector files like .eps with fonts converted to outlines provide the highest print quality. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files (300 DPI minimum) also work well when properly prepared. Include 1/8" bleed and keep files under 60 MB for smooth upload processing and optimal print results.

Do you offer design help for business cards?

Yes, our professional graphic designers provide design assistance for $60 per hour. We can help create new designs, optimize existing artwork, or ensure your files meet printing specifications. You'll receive email proofs for approval before production begins, ensuring your business cards meet your exact requirements.

## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Product Overview

StikPics photo tiles transform your digital memories into premium custom wall art that adheres without damaging surfaces. Our stikpics photo tiles printing process uses high-resolution technology on durable polystyrene foam board, creating scratch and moisture-resistant displays perfect for any environment. Each custom photo tile features three mounting options: repositionable adhesive for temporary installations, permanent adhesive for textured surfaces, and traditional picture hangers for existing hardware.

These custom stikpics photo tiles eliminate the need for nails, screws, or permanent wall modifications while delivering professional-quality results. The repositionable adhesive technology allows you to rearrange your photo displays seasonally or move them between rooms without residue. Whether creating a gallery wall, seasonal displays, or business presentations, our stikpics photo tiles design process ensures your images maintain vibrant colors and sharp detail. Available in multiple custom sizes, each tile ships ready to install with your chosen mounting system.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Material Options

Our stikpics photo tiles printing utilizes premium polystyrene foam board construction, also known as Gator Board, engineered for durability and longevity. This professional-grade material features scratch-resistant surfaces, warp prevention technology, and moisture resistance to protect your images in various environments. The reinforced melamine and wood fiber veneer backing provides structural integrity while maintaining lightweight portability.

The foam board construction offers superior dimensional stability compared to traditional photo printing methods, preventing curling and edge lifting over time. This material choice ensures your custom stikpics photo tiles maintain their flat profile and professional appearance whether displayed vertically or horizontally. The smooth surface finish enhances color vibrancy and provides excellent ink adhesion for lasting print quality. Each material component is selected for indoor durability while remaining repositionable without surface damage.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Installation and Finishing Options

Choose from three professional mounting systems designed for different installation needs and surface types. Our repositionable adhesive provides damage-free installation on smooth surfaces like drywall, painted walls, and glass, allowing multiple repositioning without losing adhesive strength or leaving residue. The permanent adhesive option delivers secure mounting on textured surfaces including brick, concrete, and wood where repositionable adhesives may not adhere effectively.

Traditional picture hanger hardware accommodates existing wall mounting systems and provides the most secure installation for high-traffic areas. Each stikpics photo tiles installation method includes detailed instructions for optimal results. The repositionable option works best on clean, smooth surfaces and can be removed and reinstalled multiple times. For businesses requiring frequent display changes, this flexibility makes seasonal promotions and rotating exhibits effortless while protecting valuable wall surfaces from damage.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Production Times

Our flexible production scheduling accommodates urgent deadlines and budget-conscious timelines with four turnaround options. Priority one-day production handles time-sensitive projects, while two-day express service balances speed with cost efficiency. The popular three-day standard option provides free fast turnaround for most custom orders, and our five-day saver option offers budget savings for non-urgent projects.

Production begins upon file upload completion and payment processing, with orders approved after 5:00 PM CST processed the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes are available through customer service consultation. All production times exclude shipping duration, and proof requests pause production until approval confirmation. Our streamlined workflow ensures consistent quality control regardless of chosen production speed.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Payment Options

All custom photo tiles require payment before production begins, ensuring order accuracy and preventing delays. We accept major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate processing and faster production starts. Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your order enters production, which may extend overall delivery time.

Your credit card will not be charged until you approve your final order and artwork, providing peace of mind during the design review process. This payment policy protects both parties and ensures you receive exactly what you ordered. For large volume orders or corporate accounts, contact customer service to discuss alternative payment arrangements and potential volume discounts on multiple stikpics photo tiles orders.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Shipping Guidelines

Standard UPS Ground shipping reaches 90% of the United States within 1-3 business days, with tracking numbers provided upon shipment. Shipping costs are calculated by package weight and destination, with additional charges applying to oversized orders. Multiple shipping speeds are available including overnight, two-day, three-day, and standard options to meet your timeline requirements.

International shipping requires customer-provided labels and customs documentation through USPS or UPS only. Economy shipping adds 5-10 additional days depending on destination and requires complete address information including P.O. Box details when applicable. Our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 can provide specific shipping quotes and timeline estimates for your stikpics photo tiles shipping needs before you place your order.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Common Uses

Home decorators use repositionable photo tiles to create seasonal displays, gallery walls, and rotating family photo arrangements without wall damage. The flexibility to rearrange displays makes them ideal for rental properties, dorm rooms, and temporary living situations. Businesses leverage custom photo tiles for promotional displays, employee recognition walls, and trade show presentations that can be easily transported and reconfigured.

Educational institutions appreciate damage-free installation for student artwork displays, historical timelines, and motivational imagery that can be updated frequently. Real estate professionals use photo tiles in staging properties, showcasing community amenities, and creating appealing visual presentations that can be removed without trace. Event planners incorporate them into backdrop designs, memorial displays, and celebration décor where traditional mounting methods aren't practical or permitted.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

StikPics Photo Tiles Artwork Requirements

Upload high-resolution images with minimum dimensions of 800x800 pixels for optimal print quality on our professional-grade printers. Larger files produce superior results, especially for bigger custom sizes where image detail becomes more critical. Our prepress team reviews all artwork for quality and will contact you if resolution enhancement is recommended for your specific stikpics photo tiles design.

Professional graphic design services are available if you're unsure about file quality or need assistance optimizing your images. Order proofs provide low-resolution previews of your artwork along with complete order summaries before production begins, though requesting proofs will pause production until you provide approval. Supported file formats include JPEG, PNG, and PDF with RGB color profiles recommended for accurate color reproduction on your finished photo tiles.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

StikPics photo tiles represent the perfect intersection of convenience, quality, and versatility in custom photo display solutions. Whether you're creating a temporary gallery wall, updating business displays, or showcasing family memories, these damage-free alternatives to traditional framing offer unprecedented flexibility. The professional-grade materials and printing ensure your images maintain their visual impact while the repositionable technology protects your walls and provides design freedom.

From residential decorating to commercial applications, our custom photo tiles adapt to any environment and mounting challenge. Similar to our custom fridge magnets and custom car magnets, these solutions prove that high-quality custom printing can be both practical and affordable. Ready to transform your digital photos into stunning wall art? Upload your images today and discover why thousands of customers choose StikPics for their custom photo display needs.

## 14) FAQ

StikPics Photo Tiles FAQ

What image resolution do I need for best quality StikPics photo tiles?

We recommend minimum 800x800 pixel images for standard sizes, though higher resolution files produce superior results. Our high-resolution printers can handle large files effectively, so bigger is generally better for image quality. If you're unsure about your file quality, our graphic design team can evaluate and enhance your images to ensure optimal printing results on your custom photo tiles.

Can I remove and reposition my photo tiles without wall damage?

Yes, our repositionable adhesive option allows multiple removals and repositioning without damaging walls or leaving residue. This adhesive works best on smooth, clean surfaces like painted drywall and can be repositioned several times while maintaining adhesive strength. For textured surfaces like brick or wood, we recommend the permanent adhesive or picture hanger mounting options for secure installation.

How long does production take for custom StikPics photo tiles?

We offer four production timeframes: 1-day priority, 2-day express, 3-day standard (most popular), and 5-day saver options. Production begins after file upload completion and payment processing. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST start production the following business day. Production time doesn't include shipping duration, and proof requests will pause production until you provide approval for your custom design.

What surfaces work best with StikPics adhesive mounting?

Repositionable adhesive performs excellently on smooth surfaces like painted drywall, glass, and metal. For textured surfaces such as brick, concrete, or wood, choose our permanent adhesive option for stronger bonding. Picture hanger mounting works universally and provides the most secure installation for high-traffic areas or valuable photos requiring maximum stability and security.

Do you offer same-day or rush production for urgent orders?

Emergency same-day rush production is available in select cases through direct customer service consultation. Our 1-day priority option handles most urgent requests, with orders approved before 5:00 PM CST completing production the following business day. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss same-day rush possibilities and expedited shipping options for your specific timeline requirements.

Custom Postcard Materials and Specifications

Our custom postcards are digitally printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper that provides exceptional durability and professional presentation. This heavyweight cardstock ensures your postcards maintain their quality through mailing and handling while delivering vibrant color reproduction. Each postcard measures 4.25" x 5.88" (H x W), providing ample space for your message, branding, and design elements.

Choose between glossy or matte coated finishes to match your design aesthetic. The gloss finish enhances color vibrancy and creates eye-catching shine, ideal for photography and bold graphics. The matte finish offers a sophisticated, non-reflective surface perfect for text-heavy designs and elegant branding. Both finishes provide excellent print quality and professional durability.

Digital printing technology ensures consistent color accuracy and sharp detail reproduction across your entire order. Our quality control process guarantees each custom postcard meets professional standards, whether you're printing 100 pieces for a small event or thousands for a major marketing campaign. Consider pairing your postcards with our custom fridge magnets for comprehensive promotional campaigns.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Custom Postcard Materials and Specifications

Premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock provides the perfect foundation for custom postcard printing. This professional-grade cardstock offers superior thickness and durability compared to standard paper options, ensuring your postcards feel substantial and maintain their professional appearance throughout handling and mailing processes.

The heavyweight cardstock construction resists bending, tearing, and wear while providing an excellent printing surface for vibrant color reproduction. Digital printing technology penetrates the cardstock evenly, creating rich, consistent colors and sharp text clarity across every custom postcard in your order.

Our material selection process prioritizes quality and longevity, ensuring your custom postcards represent your brand professionally. Whether used for direct mail marketing, event invitations, or customer communications, this premium cardstock delivers the durability and visual impact needed for successful results. The material works seamlessly with both uploaded designs and our professional design services.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Postcard Finishing Options and Quality Features

Choose between glossy and matte coated finishes to optimize your custom postcard presentation. The glossy finish creates vibrant color enhancement with reflective shine that makes photographs, logos, and colorful graphics pop with visual impact. This finish works exceptionally well for retail promotions, restaurant menus, and image-heavy marketing materials.

Matte coating provides a sophisticated, non-reflective surface that reduces glare and fingerprints while offering excellent printability for text-focused designs. This finish is ideal for professional communications, real estate marketing, and elegant invitations where readability and understated quality matter most.

Both finishing options include protective coating that guards against moisture, handling wear, and UV fading. Our quality control process ensures consistent finish application across your entire order, delivering professional results that enhance your brand image and message effectiveness in any application.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Custom Postcard Production Times and Turnaround

Flexible production scheduling accommodates urgent deadlines and budget-conscious timelines with options ranging from 1-5 business days. Priority 1-day production handles time-sensitive marketing campaigns and last-minute event invitations. Express 2-day turnaround balances speed with cost-effectiveness for most business needs.

Standard 3-day production represents our most popular option, providing fast delivery for routine marketing and communication needs. Saver 5-day production offers budget-friendly pricing for advance planning and large quantity orders. Production begins upon file approval and payment processing completion.

Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day. Emergency same-day options may be available through customer service consultation. Production time excludes shipping duration, with tracking provided once your custom postcards ship via UPS Ground or expedited methods.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB
