All custom postcard orders require payment before production begins, ensuring efficient processing and timely delivery. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing and quick production scheduling.

Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before production can begin. This payment method works well for large organizations and advance orders where immediate production isn't required. Your credit card is only charged after you approve your order details and artwork.

Our secure payment processing protects your financial information while providing confirmation for order tracking. Payment approval triggers immediate production scheduling, helping you receive your custom postcards within your selected turnaround timeframe. Contact customer service for questions about corporate accounts or special payment arrangements.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Postcards

Standard UPS Ground shipping provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States with tracking number confirmation once your custom postcards ship. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination, with additional charges applying to large quantity orders requiring multiple packages.

Express shipping options include Overnight, Two Day, and Three Day services for time-sensitive delivery requirements. Economy shipping is available for budget-conscious orders but may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination location. International shipping requires customer-provided labels and customs documentation.

Damaged packages must be returned for replacement product shipment, while lost packages are replaced after shipping company confirmation (typically 7-10 business days). Shipping delays due to weather or circumstances beyond our control do not qualify for shipping refunds, though replacement products are provided for confirmed shipping damage.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Business and Personal Uses for Custom Postcards

Business applications include direct mail marketing campaigns, event invitations, appointment reminders, and customer thank you notes. Real estate professionals use custom postcards for property announcements, market updates, and client communication. Restaurants and retail businesses leverage postcards for promotional campaigns, seasonal greetings, and brand awareness initiatives.

Personal uses encompass travel souvenirs, wedding save-the-dates, party invitations, and holiday cards. Custom postcards work perfectly for announcements, thank you cards, and showcasing photography or artwork. The professional quality and customization options make them suitable for both casual personal communication and formal event coordination.

Marketing versatility allows integration with other promotional materials like custom car magnets for comprehensive campaigns. Whether promoting services, sharing news, or maintaining customer relationships, custom postcards provide cost-effective communication that recipients often keep and reference, extending your message lifespan beyond initial delivery.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Artwork Requirements for Custom Postcard Printing

Vector-based files such as .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) with fonts converted to outlines produce the highest print quality. High-resolution .pdf or .jpg files also work well, typically requiring 300 DPI or higher resolution for optimal results. Our prepress team reviews all uploaded artwork to ensure print compatibility.

Professional design services are available for $60 per hour if you need assistance creating or optimizing your postcard design. Our graphic designers can help improve file quality, adjust layouts, and ensure your custom postcards meet professional printing standards for maximum impact.

Color-critical projects should utilize our Color Match Proof System to ensure accurate color reproduction. File upload supports files up to 60 MB, accommodating high-resolution designs and complex graphics. Contact customer service if you have questions about file formats or need design consultation for your custom postcard project.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional Custom Postcard Design Services

Stay connected with customers, friends, and family using high-quality custom postcards from Banners.com. Our premium cardstock printing with vibrant gloss or matte finishes ensures your message stands out in mailboxes and makes lasting impressions. Professional design support and flexible turnaround options help you create eye-catching results for any application.

From direct mail marketing campaigns to personal event invitations, our custom postcards deliver the quality and durability your communications deserve. Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Postcards

**Q: What are the dimensions and specifications of your custom postcards?** A: Our custom postcards measure 4.25" x 5.88" (height x width) and are printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper. Both options include protective coating for longevity. **Q: How quickly can I receive my custom postcard order?** A: We offer flexible production times from 1-5 business days to accommodate various timeline needs. Priority 1-day production handles urgent orders, while our popular 3-day standard option balances speed and cost-effectiveness. Production begins after artwork approval and payment processing. Shipping time is additional, with UPS Ground providing 1-3 day delivery to most locations. **Q: What file formats do you accept for custom postcard artwork?** A: Vector-based files like .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) with outlined fonts produce optimal results. We also accept high-resolution .pdf, .jpg, and .tiff files, typically 300 DPI or higher. Files up to 60 MB are supported through our upload system. Our prepress team reviews all artwork for print compatibility and may contact you if adjustments are needed. **Q: Do you provide design assistance for custom postcard projects?** A: Yes, our professional graphic designers offer design assistance at $60 per hour for customers who need help creating or optimizing their postcard designs. We can improve file quality, adjust layouts, and ensure your postcards meet professional printing standards. Additionally, our Color Match Proof System helps ensure accurate color reproduction for color-critical projects. **Q: What payment and shipping options are available?** A: Payment is required before production begins. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, and checks (which must clear before production). Standard UPS Ground shipping provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the US with tracking. Express options include overnight, two-day, and three-day services. International shipping requires customer-provided labels and customs documentation.

Custom Wallpaper Materials and Specifications

Our custom printed wallpaper transforms ordinary walls into stunning visual displays using your artwork or designs. Made from premium textured vinyl with medium-tack adhesive, this self-adhesive wallpaper eliminates the need for traditional wallpaper paste while ensuring strong adhesion to most painted surfaces.

The material features repositionable properties, allowing for easy adjustments during installation without losing adhesive strength. Our full-color digital printing process captures every detail of your design with exceptional clarity and vibrant colors. The textured vinyl surface provides durability and helps mask minor wall imperfections.

Available in custom sizes up to 12 feet in both height and width, this wallpaper solution works perfectly for accent walls, commercial displays, office branding, or complete room makeovers. The material applies smoothly with basic tools like a squeegee and hair dryer for professional-looking results. Whether you're creating branded environments or personalizing living spaces, our custom wallpaper delivers professional-quality results with easy DIY installation.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Wallpaper Finishing and Installation Options

Our custom printed wallpaper uses premium textured vinyl material specifically engineered for wall applications. The medium-tack adhesive provides excellent bonding to painted drywall, smooth plaster, and sealed surfaces while maintaining repositioning capabilities during installation.

The textured vinyl surface offers superior print quality compared to standard wallpaper materials, with enhanced color saturation and sharp detail reproduction. This finishing resists fading and maintains its appearance over time, making it ideal for both temporary and long-term installations.

Installation requires no special tools beyond a squeegee and hair dryer. The self-adhesive backing eliminates messy paste mixing and reduces installation time significantly. The material accommodates minor wall imperfections and can be trimmed with standard cutting tools for precise fitting around outlets, corners, and architectural features. For best results, ensure walls are clean, dry, and properly cured before application.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

We offer flexible production scheduling to match your project timeline with four distinct turnaround options for custom wallpaper printing. Our 1-day priority production handles urgent installations, while 2-day express service provides quick turnaround for time-sensitive projects.

Payment Options for Wallpaper Orders

Custom printed wallpaper serves diverse applications across residential, commercial, and retail environments. Homeowners use personalized wallpaper for accent walls, children's rooms, and unique interior design statements that reflect personal style.

Businesses leverage branded wallpaper for office environments, reception areas, and conference rooms to reinforce corporate identity. Retail stores create immersive shopping experiences with custom graphics and seasonal displays using removable wallpaper solutions.

## 14) FAQ

Custom Wallpaper FAQ

What surfaces work best for custom self-adhesive wallpaper?

Our custom wallpaper adheres excellently to painted drywall, smooth plaster, and properly sealed surfaces. The medium-tack adhesive bonds well to most latex and acrylic paints that have fully cured. Avoid applying to textured surfaces, unpainted drywall, or freshly painted walls. Clean, dry surfaces produce the strongest adhesion and easiest installation for long-lasting results.

How do I ensure my artwork prints correctly on wallpaper?

Submit vector files (.eps, .ai) with fonts converted to outlines for optimal print quality. High-resolution raster files (300 DPI minimum) also produce excellent results. Our prepress team reviews all artwork and contacts you if files need optimization. Consider ordering a proof for color-critical projects or request our Color Match Proof System for precise color reproduction on vinyl material.

Can custom wallpaper be removed without damaging walls?

Yes, our wallpaper is designed for clean removal from most properly painted surfaces. The repositionable adhesive allows for adjustments during installation and eventual removal without leaving residue or damaging paint. Removal ease depends on wall surface, paint quality, and application duration. Test a small area first if you're concerned about your specific wall surface or paint type.

What are the size limitations for custom wallpaper printing?

We print custom wallpaper up to 12 feet in both height and width, accommodating most residential and commercial wall applications. Larger installations can be created using multiple panels with careful design planning for seamless alignment. Our customer service team can help determine the best panel configuration for your space and provide guidance on installation sequencing for multi-panel projects.

How long does custom wallpaper production and shipping take?

Production ranges from 1-5 business days depending on your selected timeline, with 3-day standard being most popular. Shipping typically adds 1-3 business days via UPS Ground to most US locations. Total project time includes artwork approval, production, and shipping duration. Rush options available for urgent installations, and expedited shipping can further reduce delivery time for time-sensitive projects.
